name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Two Million People!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=1)
---
Peter \-- It's happening again.. The media and the political class are creating a fear campaign...this time with a new COVID variant. Power hungry governors like Tim Walz are on the verge of declaring a new "emergency". Business shutdowns and mask mandates may happen all over again. All because Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka refused to pass Mort's **Never Again Bill** before passing Governor Walz' bloated budget. **Can you imagine if our businesses were shut back down, students were forced to wear masks and a third vaccine shot is forced upon us by the Department of Health?** This could actually happen! There's simply nothing more important than Ending Walz' Emergency Powers for good by making sure it **Never Happens Again**. Although our enemies will do everything they can to derail this powerful movement. Fortunately, we have a HUGE opportunity at hand. To STOP this nightmare from happening again, we can put our message in front of 2 million people by going to the Minnesota State Fair! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=2) It's time we kick things up to the next level. Let's take our message of making sure Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN to the largest stage in Minnesota. **Just imagine seeing a stand at the State Fair calling out Walz for his lockdowns, mask mandates, potential vaccine passports, the lawlessness of the cities and how he changed election laws! It's time we WAKE UP more people to the devastation of this Governor.** The political class thinks we're just going to go away now that Walz' powers ended...temporarily. But they couldn't be more WRONG! We continue growing and hiring more young liberty professionals so this movement continues building. It's vitally important to the future of this state that we pass Mort's **Never Again Bill**! **Please help us drown out the COVID Cult's narrative, and put our own message in front of 2 Million people at the Minnesota State Fair by donating today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=3 "DONATE NOW!") [DONATE NOW!](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=3)
---
If you know the state fair, the Radical Left will be there in droves. Tim Walz' Re-election Campaign and Keith Ellison will have booths spreading their propaganda to the uninformed voter.
_We have a chance to set the record straight by telling the REAL STORY of the last 16 months._
But we can't do this without your help. If Action 4 Liberty's Never Again booth doesn't happen, Tim Walz and the Radical Left will dominate the conversation at the fairgrounds. We can't afford to miss this opportunity!
[**Peter, don't let Governor Walz spew his propaganda unchecked! Donate $25, $50 or $100 immediately to put our message in front of 2 million people!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=4)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=million_to_see_never_again&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Special Election for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative: House Freedom Fund has one mission: to help elect strong, tough, principled conservatives to the U.S. House of Representatives. In Texas’s 6th congressional district, we’ve found one.

**Susan Wright** (R-TX) is exactly the kind of leader we need in the House to fight liberals in both parties. Susan has HFF’s full endorsement and support, and I hope she can count on yours too.

[**Join House Freedom Fund in supporting Susan today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9731f0eedd7f45fe86e34d1941df21c0&_e=HSCm2S3G6wQzQKgPfC8hIDH-swWGZI-s9V4RM8ISka58l0YMdBEww0ZMGsPvi_Ki1vWUfvMWOSKG6W61YH0AxWEBxr0zRyd604ry1ruh6ZeQbweTuXn429i5YzhPv2AfWM6t-2zxpkhLbia6MOBfereFkCYhCPHikoFJubbGgqIfIYWGhT5Kg-TZTdw1P8g2c0CAv7BOJEyKOw8iU0U5EtoNO9cx0M6Nu6p8uFz6N9BbHE-xq5Nvw_xfbHEe1YLaVAqJN6mw88IbT23dPJ_EfMPZy_UGCjLshR8U8FWA35YktL6sjS2aYse2o80jXuRwN6MNYtATm2AkAS2LDigjPQ%3D%3D)

Susan is the widow of former House Freedom Caucus member Ron Wright, a great friend and a tireless champion for traditional American values. His death in February was a shock. But his legacy of service and commitment to making America great again is at the heart of Susan’s campaign to replace him.

▶︎ Susan is a pro-life, pro-gun, pro-wall conservative ready to take on The Swamp.

▶︎ She has served Texas for three decades – working in the state legislature, advising local communities on transportation and economic issues, and fighting the Left at her husband’s side.

▶︎ She has publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus.

▶︎ She has been endorsed by President Donald Trump.

[**Susan is ready to fight for us. Please help us fight for her!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9731f0eedd7f45fe86e34d1941df21c0&_e=HSCm2S3G6wQzQKgPfC8hIDH-swWGZI-s9V4RM8ISka58l0YMdBEww0ZMGsPvi_Ki1vWUfvMWOSKG6W61YH0AxWEBxr0zRyd604ry1ruh6ZeQbweTuXn429i5YzhPv2AfOHaACd6B0pU2Z70NtUi-54vncVytVFDjIgS0TFUr95Vy8_jMP6DoCqUr2V0dlkcHaVgjqzIVTXyaWZS3GHQCFImMX669bvIpF15QD_4f9insA18iMiuboYOg475ukmDeGQDclcWh5rPiGP-XyqwKxT1gYcfwWdkLvfOZMW5shOx-cTbVdn53IO2wHPzYrQd7cqzAbJytmku10RWVapnBlA%3D%3D)

Susan finished first in the primary election, ahead of 22 other candidates. Now she is in the runoff up against a classic RINO who favors amnesty and opposes school choice.

Never-Trump Republicans are funding Susan’s opponent, who is trying to win the July 27th runoff election with Democrat crossover votes.

**Conservatives must answer this challenge.**

President Trump supports Susan. So do grassroots conservatives in Texas and around the country. This election is HFF’s top election priority for this summer. We have to send a message to the Never-Trump RINOs that they’re not in charge anymore.

[**Please give Susan your support today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9731f0eedd7f45fe86e34d1941df21c0&_e=HSCm2S3G6wQzQKgPfC8hIDH-swWGZI-s9V4RM8ISka58l0YMdBEww0ZMGsPvi_Ki1vWUfvMWOSKG6W61YH0AxWEBxr0zRyd604ry1ruh6ZeQbweTuXn429i5YzhPv2Af5MsWbD2CgffOOGnV3lIpB3JsMfafC-KIxaXBM7GGuvnZc1aC_1QNtKTISYlpuUfqevcNwEQYZ8GTJtkWqEgjpHiqCwNOBiglItVK_zwCk7u4qso6sFEYBjxWiPBBA-2FqugjTXnIe5NNXa4aVvoMvqg-jYINvz4t_c1vBdUkpiLTNa7xzknOTf30isn0ZTTJXziaVsWYlNbQvHzjUbNa2g%3D%3D)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to support conservative leadership in Washington. Sincerely, Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund | |
---
**COUNTDOWN TO JULY 27TH
RUNOFF ELECTION**
|
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9731f0eedd7f45fe86e34d1941df21c0&_e=HSCm2S3G6wQzQKgPfC8hIDH-swWGZI-s9V4RM8ISka58l0YMdBEww0ZMGsPvi_Ki1vWUfvMWOSKG6W61YH0AxWEBxr0zRyd604ry1ruh6ZeQbweTuXn429i5YzhPv2AfNx2NOLI7J5frDt_ahacsB2FCqMX8OhYdygioIvWzgkTJuNkLynqbcRRGVOMAME5aQlMsGav4RHURjarqUN3nBKU12uzIYrGpQ4AzHUNVBwwxoNq9vhAsvQ_CQRyp85YPV8sZkwzRg2V_lpTGVZFeCxfGDrF6iGhPwBHX0o_a86-iSxrzkv9FwmPWbakp4md3W0nbI2s3g3cNfCAPv1bUNA%3D%3D)
|
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

name: Cicely Davis
subject: I'm Running Against Ilhan Omar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lHjXmx_7l42_EFnSAYKP8x9b_qyAd0dmQSYBSOfD8DzgAnfpdTr4iA3MZlJG_gjVpT8pEAmRrScwW9KXzNj5Nu1X-CHKbHMrFpptr-SwkPBhLUi-CF-aWxk4tHxPEryaymHfdMDyt5X2EMg8_dZWC22ry26Z_6m1dcMaOCmdEd-EnfQgd1wfZq6zFuBCLysj3KGLAFzUM4Ir3ves5EkyXvPw%3D%3D)

---

Fellow American,

I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: **hard work and the American Dream.**

My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home.

If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. **I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end.**

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lHQmbGQ5wbwFm0DbcLUjPSiqRHnaiN9p56w4l6D_c8Yc8lsZBRGsqBGWPEEdMZQoVmrcniSKUZPRdaEqJQgOjIzF8b-u6Gg8kDXfzsCLPHKj5l_GwwQeHr1p8o-wk0e3-JoapITlg7i9VNdhvRTpmg8x3DgYu8lakcxiRu__owrRQDem4UMDtqVK56nDZI-485I0burL8iXnXfCr8Z7mykxQ%3D%3D)
For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. **She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police,** **now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year.**

Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides.

**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out?** [**If you’ve had enough, then it’s time to take a stand.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lHHeRvZBf5Ox4AQQO0o16KAhedIgLCTH2Ug15pkaFk_2duNbpm4o5e4ustMa0HwfMjM24M97d8kbUfiOnnOSnGIpZ9lQFLBhiHRLxGIw03O46zNrOfzhEz9PGVr1o-pqZOvI9WWmxEqj8_LRJy-TNM1FjWhc_Fu-PQ2BknETKXkvGSx12OqiR-YEAaNv9HOWIcfibevnRSAWL-vPomrfZk1Q%3D%3D)

[**Fellow American, will you help me kick off my campaign by sending $10, $25, $50, $100 or more?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lHw58e1KHqHPLhPCNhoCZu48oVO2MzcJ6-tJtq78L_S2CY79dAdwh2uFs011Q_qS1HiCEyd5LM7JG_NCB8RJPUxusMqBXi6S9nEvBa0O_kzxlPl_NphSRkvkN7mjPVv1DZ_taAKE7YL0KeQ7jep3jVHCgMegabfsZmptZpEYS4TRqLaUA-WlnqUEJkn2RJ_pX5F7vhzsxWP2CJ-BRy8xNJ4A%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH CICELY **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lH1rBvcnldFmeTfwqY_254CXglugzVbHqlAWiQ0x1hrxkBRH0g9TcVBog9be1vbR2Dnb_xi-a4dJ_dwKAstuHirpHkdGnNe3NkW7V6fiV42HIbiPW7R3NdMJdp87vmZ3LN6mUioD0faF-5BKfUrXBl9_VAlD1g7cD6cXmK-ip4jcKi7H4CZ_TENRlneCatN0yEfd1dyoFZWf0RoJ9fjD8PTw%3D%3D)
I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time.

**I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference,** [**support me today and let’s kick Ilhan Omar out of Congress.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d4eedd0e91fe423c872a9869adbfca8f&_e=IsoZLidWQRH6Ts_MbtBjn2JpnPPukdJM9gRGx8rSqFg6sad5m4h9kOlgF_DJ6KeaeIpcA6NBwMMV-s9TLlpAHWNVqTZXi3doYLAMbepmDLGur7Jwe2T-bD0tm8ni_URcOnz7ztSElQrmpcUZ9EKqm9t1fK-tMBQBITvfpKwsmwfiEBppN3oySQiDFaF6C2lHzYkKBoG6jLkCiDlFpClOQdSRXmnjvJk65_mGDnOxJQTd5cAb1GJ6-l2f2an3Ku2Un1IYhLfavCTngJA1g454CbU2ZlUa_jEK9fsBD29EDm9H6F3mu8-Kv5PYHba-ksMTHeM-7Q9aZQD4EI73k5uiIBKxr3kM96rs2fC1Ocjmdd09KvtN2ZfYdF15JvF34fForwcQPYawpG8mCme6sfBrFQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. | Fellow American, I’m running for Congress against Squad Member Ilhan Omar because it’s time for my community, my state, and our nation to get back to what made us great to begin with: hard work and the American Dream. My name is Cicely Davis, and I’m fighting to bring back the Star of the North. I grew up in Minneapolis, and I remember when my city was beautiful and thriving, but thanks to Ilhan Omar and her Radical friends I barely recognize my home. If you’re familiar with Minnesota, then you know Democrats in my state have destroyed our economy, brought violence to our streets, and exploited racial divisions to gain power. I’m here to tell you that we can put that reign to an end. For too long Ilhan Omar has been allowed to spread hate and push radical politics to every corner of this nation. She pressed my city of Minneapolis to defund the police, now it’s a breeding ground for crime where murders alone have increased 49% since last year. Omar has praised BLM while they set fire to our communities, she spends every waking moment bashing the very country that welcomed her, and her family with open arms and does so while enjoying more freedoms than any other nation in this world provides. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. How long can we stand by and let Omar and the Democrats slowly tear our nation apart from the inside out? I refuse to sit by as Omar and the Democrats continue on this path of destructiveness. If you want to restore our nation then we need to take action now, even if it means reclaiming one state, one city, or even one community at time. I need your help to restore what made our nation so great to begin with, and it starts with places like Minneapolis. This is your chance to make a real difference, For America, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Can Amnesty Contribute to Election Issues?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGyyXE&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EtKnMLN&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/b03fd038-fcb1-4605-a0b5-837cb5216683.png]

Yes, amnesty effects elections and the left loves it!
(HINT: So does Newhouse and the Swamp)

It's no secret that the Democrat Party pushes to give amnesty to individuals who break our nation's laws and cross our borders illegally. We must ask, why do the Dems push for amnesty so strongly?

The answer: votes.

The Democrat Party believes it can buy votes with a pathway to citizenship for lawbreakers. How do we know that's their plan? Because in left-leaning towns and cities "non-citizens" (meaning people who aren't Americans) are already allowed to vote in local elections. You're saying, "That can't be true." Unfortunately, it is.Tacoma Park in Maryland proudly states on their website "A resident does not need to be a U.S. citizen to vote in an election for mayor and city council." [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJb5p&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EwyTGCe&]By allowing illegal aliens to become citizens through amnesty bills, the Democrats are granting "non-citizens" the power to vote and undermine the American people, undermine you.

But it isn't just Democrats giving away your voting power!

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/12932eee-9986-453c-8e8b-a9241d365691.jpg]

Dan Newhouse's co-sponsored amnesty bill, and also his vote to pass the Democrat bill "American Dream and Promise Act 2021" shows Newhouse is helping the radical left destroy the integrity of the American vote, of your vote.
Back in October 2020,Joe Biden said, "I'm going to send to the United States Congress a pathway to citizenship for over 11 million undocumented people"and Dan Newhouse is helping him fulfill that statement.

Maybe that explains why Newhouse voted to unconstitutionally impeach President Trump?

Newhouse prioritized his buddies in Washington D.C. before Americans, before you, his constituents, when he sided with the Biden agenda of amnesty. We need our public servants to be focused on "America First" policies that protect the integrity of our election, not destroy it.

2020 showed us who the RINOs were and together we can show Newhouse and the radical left that Americans are tough and we're not afraid to roll up our sleeves and clean up this mess in Washington D.C.

Every patriotic American must stand for truth and get involved. A great way to do that is by serving on your local city council, school boards, becoming a precinct committeeman [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJbYW&mc=rR&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EzRC97V&], or volunteering for the campaigns of "America First" candidates.

We can once more be "The shining city on a hill", a light for the world.

Fortune favors the bold,

Loren

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Purdue Pharma's Multi-Trillion Dollar Lawsuit Settlement
body:
| | | | Read about why I stood against it, and how I am fighting for West Virginians first.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Yesterday, [_**I was on Newsmax discussing why I am opposing a bankruptcy settlement proposal by OxyContin maker Purdue Pharma for our state.**_](http://url8766.teammorrisey.com/ls/click?upn=1Tdwy4hnuy5QvBqgHcrNA64LrPw8Fnb1lU7zAFhsYG0o0XszSJDLDUpGZXJv4oPD6bIGHchoiP5XZ59rjEzwB8Tu5iMI4sFC2IImr4oAD77CGmCzT5-2Fg718ozBlEs3Yy-2BCuf8u2q2tLvpqjbnJcOe3SNk9HtQn-2Bb2sfQ6L0W9Qw-3DUXu4_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz63O0I19PdNnFe4DI1XNh-2Fh-2BtmS8JtQgJFDUq30ljewke0HZed9d3QAwTYoEREfHMe8zP8jOEFMrYcPfHmulUoOe9eHa7rmUZ1EwRfIiVPSq6YscuhInP8tc9v8X1IKTxzG99IZu0lIfRqZgl-2By0pkdb3F2-2F-2Fer7qGWjsEROLu3C-2BLkrxPzcD2ltbMNfkzGK86x-2Fn7BAqIhoHx9RMseRs8urRdnS-2B9JYE57KnBP-2Bl2QCd0rY8dv9xoYeue71Wybs9h6e-2FAdR-2FfRe0AaATmOYfPidwCT1hOrCSYxlYDJiqsuwLzkoiOxzbZEwE9iOopLcqH1e5WvF60Cl5g7zvgzqRwmkCvTN1XsQyUNFgDAPUa3BSn2b95dkpPo2GtZuFP6IfATmyVYQd6nHCV38NgRC5xVLBFyjkAErUH6iXITyMFfkbVC3q9CzOnu89SkGGDqK0a-2Bf1MNgcNrGFv2jmorLSiwc3s2wLPWvAWjdMLlwR7uPB-2BwKdxwzc1h8FjyzkQkIZh4ugQ3Pz50HJrNQqnSUIfP1HkNrzV4XKY6wPvtc-2FGqu3zfONITaWfbw9wJ1ZTGM7OLe08NlbIylKe6Wv1TGmj0kc5BWew302uVnebSqvjgahwiDvVs6p1DFKRIqp4IB65rwYga556yDxee2OhWNk-2FDi-2F8s-2BeoU3otvYODTncsr0ZrdEjWHYG8X5arHWnMABX3o8Bj-2B77Yh34zys7sGjxqowQdQqv8-2F-2BsN9MyrXIAJM3fKmBm-2BBDeoIcUmB6y-2BMJ8DOQOjdF23pxdhi6Ouqh2KrtjGE6cymSB0GnP7H8zlowzA4f2KnLqZV-2FENtI2lSlEMF7Fw0UO-2FqV-2BK72TNm5D0Mw-3D-3D)
I want the settlement **ALLOCATION FORMULA** for the money to be determined by the **SEVERITY** of the **PROBLEM** in each state, rather than their proposed formula, where they make most funding decisions based on population.
_A population-based formula is disastrous for West Virginia as our state was one of the hardest hit by the Opioid Epidemic._
Yet, here’s what’s even worse. This Purdue settlement, as well, as other settlement proposals, have a sweetheart provision for California.
That’s right. California is trying to carve out a separate deal which hurts West Virginia and EVERY other state.
Government makes a lot of mistakes and you hear me talk about them all the time.
But we need not throw money down the black hole by awarding opioid monies to states primarily based upon population — this isn’t how you fix a major National problem.
I will never stop fighting for what is best for West Virginia, and will work tirelessly to fight against the Opioid Epidemic that has ravaged our state.
I hope you will help me spread the word.
Sincerely,
---
---
Patrick Morrisey Attorney General of West Virginia

Peter,Vice President Kamala Harris laughed when she was asked why she hadn't visited our southern border. Then, despite the border being in crisis mode, Kamala Harris waited 93 days to fulfill her obligations as an elected official. Drugs, crime, and illegal immigration are coming in at record numbers as we face one of the most severe border crises in years.We need leaders who respect the office of the people they represent. name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)

[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996105:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996106:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996107:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996108:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-166204](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996104:6RqCJBlZN:m:1:3253819041:A04EFBF1B3C6CEB7999F43772A3A8F20:r)**

| | Issue: 005 Friday, July 23, 2021
---
|
---
| | If you are reading this on Friday, I am either on the road up to Washington, or settling in and getting ready for the big March for Medicare for All, taking place on Saturday, July 24. Thanks to some quick information from our friends down in Hialeah, I'll actually be staying up here, now, for the Cuban Freedom March on Monday, July 26th, as well. These are two very important events, representing the growth in support for two major federal initiatives that greatly impact our lives in Florida, and I am excited and honored to be able to be part of this monumental weekend here in D.C.
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7NhEXw3C/c?w=f-oEkvnk_4iZ1-Js8c3oBdTHOfPX_-5paNIpVjHaA8k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2V2ZW50cy80MDAyNDk4OTc5MzE4NDQiLCJyIjoiOGQ5NjBmNGYtZmYwMy00YjE0LTQzYzYtYjZhYjJjNWMyYTgyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODlmYjU1NDktNDkzNC00YzQ5LWJkNGYtNGFlYTJlODYzODE2In0)
---
| | IN REVIEW The main reason for today's newsletter is to share with you the exciting release of our first major ad!! This one is going out everywhere, and we're asking for all of your support to make this viral. Please, follow the links below and find it on YouTube, Facebook, Twitter, Instagram -- any platform you can, and do those three beautiful things that will set the algorithms on fire. LIKE -- COMMENT -- SHARE We are trying to get this information out to everyone we can, in every way we can, and we are hoping for two major outcomes: 1) Raise our profile, and bring mainstream national awareness to this campaign. 2) Raise some money. I'm always going to be open and honest with you, and quite frankly, we will never be the biggest fundraiser in this race, nor do we aspire to be. Too many politicians prioritize money over people, and that's never going to be us. This summer, I have spent far more time out meeting people, and listening to the needs in local communities throughout our state than I have spent sitting on the phone, calling progressive donors. People will always be more important than money to us, but we do need money, too. This month, we hired on our first full time employee (Jesse Rubens, out of Broward County is our new statewide Field Director), we have a part-time Social Media Director on staff (Angelize Colon, out of Hillsborough County), and we are looking to make our next big hire with a Political Director, this fall. The rest of our team is completely volunteer driven, at this time. In order to pay people what they're worth, we have to have money. [Please, if you can, consider making a contribution today. And if you are with us for the long haul, consider making it a recurring monthly contribution.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7NhEXw3C/c?w=3aS0eiz2CCO5_rz6S6pdG-GKLsFmCkrh0AUqujdQbd8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dlaWxqZmxzZW5hdGUiLCJyIjoiZWJlZmVhYzItYmZhNS00Y2QzLTQwOTctYjMzYzc2YTAxMzUzIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODlmYjU1NDktNDkzNC00YzQ5LWJkNGYtNGFlYTJlODYzODE2In0)
---
| | [](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7NhEXw3C/c?w=PNvZbjftdcoeohPtRF4HHlFc6M1Lqxtl1xABRvwtrGg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvL2E3TmhFWHczQz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiI2ZWI0MzA1ZS1hZDdmLTQ1NTEtZjA1Yy02MGQyMjVmMzVhYjgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI4OWZiNTU0OS00OTM0LTRjNDktYmQ0Zi00YWVhMmU4NjM4MTYifQ)
---
|
---
| | WHAT'S NEXT There's still about two weeks left after this trip to D.C. for me to make it around the state, and do daily trips to meet with voters and organizers in different counties, but come August 9th, and the start of a new school year, I'll be back in Weekend Warrior mode. The great news is, we hit all of our major benchmarks this summer in terms of growth and expansion, and we have a fantastic Field Director helping to ensure that our passionate volunteers will be covering more ground this fall than I ever could alone. We're here because of you, so truly, madly deeply, with all of my heart... Thank You!
---
| | | [**DONATE TO SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN**](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/a7NhEXw3C/c?w=UP2Lv7W8zselnKgSnJHpOuhzHOvRaknr30a8qSl57Po.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dlaWxqZmxzZW5hdGUiLCJyIjoiN2M4ZTAwOTctMGQyNC00ZDBlLWFmYzgtMDk5Y2UzNjgxZDVlIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiODlmYjU1NDktNDkzNC00YzQ5LWJkNGYtNGFlYTJlODYzODE2In0)

This month, we hired on our first full time employee (Jesse Rubens, out of Broward County is our new statewide Field Director), we have a part-time Social Media Director on staff (Angelize Colon, out of Hillsborough County), and we are looking to make our next big hire with a Political Director, this fall. The rest of our team is completely volunteer driven, at this time. In order to pay people what they're worth, we have to have money. | | | | | WHAT'S NEXT There's still about two weeks left after this trip to D.C. for me to make it around the state, and do daily trips to meet with voters and organizers in different counties, but come August 9th, and the start of a new school year, I'll be back in Weekend Warrior mode. The great news is, we hit all of our major benchmarks this summer in terms of growth and expansion, and we have a fantastic Field Director helping to ensure that our passionate volunteers will be covering more ground this fall than I ever could alone. We're here because of you, so truly, madly deeply, with all of my heart... Thank You! | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | Share on social | | Created with | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

subject: Fauci LIED AGAIN, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time for Dr. Fauci to find another job.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r) | |
---
Peter,

On May 11th, Dr. Fauci lied to our faces.

He came to the Senate and told us that the NIH absolutely did not fund gain of function research.

That simply isn't true and I gave Dr. Fauci the chance to retract his statements in our Senate hearing today.

No surprise, he stood by his lies.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
It's never been more clear that Dr. Fauci believes he's invincible. He believes our strong bureaucracy and his corrupt allies in Congress will defend him till the end. He thinks he can avoid accountability completely.

_I'm doing everything to prove him wrong. _

I'm leading the charge to #FIREFAUCI and hold him accountable for lying to Congress, misleading the public, and for his well-documented role in providing funds to the Wuhan Lab in China so they can create bioweapons like COVID-19.

Will you join my fight by chipping in now?

**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $10**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)
**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**

Dr. Fauci has proven time and time again that he has no idea what he's doing.

He's not an expert in COVID. He's an expert in political theater!

You can see that every time he's in front of the microphone.

* He still says he doesn't know the role China played in the pandemic.
* He denies he supported gain of function research despite the paper trail that _proves he did._
* He claims to "trusts the science" but repeatedly denies it in favor of theatrics and dramatic attacks.

He dances around it, but we know the truth. We've seen the documents. We've read the emails. We've watched the COVID hysteria unfold over the past 18 months.

Not only was he flat-out wrong about the virus, but he's also continuously lied to the American public and demonstrated poor judgment.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. It's time for Fauci TO GO.

**That's why I'm putting my foot down and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2615210-raf/ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)**

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength and support against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy. **[Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57996350:JVaAPBlNG:m:1:3253819041:CE6075DD0AE0C12150A084DB0FE1E62B:r)

**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Youth are being crushed under the weight of student debt.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32852100/297072327/-1668467654?refcode=em_fr_210723DEBT_n_lc_90do_5_ng_n_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjgwMmMyYi1iY2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSGI8f7JF3pQrYwe1YkAuh3l7mRpozpPT6DVrBBFZb8=) Friend, Student loan debt is the second-largest source of household debt, and it’s crippling entire communities. Black Americans hold twice as much student loan debt as their white counterparts, making student-loan cancellation a matter of racial justice as well as economic equality. In 2020, we helped elect President Biden and a Democratic majority in Congress in part because they vowed to address the student loan debt crisis. With over 45 million people in the US holding $1.6 trillion in student debt, it’s time they act. [**_Will you support our efforts to elect candidates who support progressive policies, like ending student debt, by donating $25, $50, or whatever you can afford today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32852101/297072328/-643924767?refcode=em_fr_210723DEBT_n_lc_90do_5_ng_n_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjgwMmMyYi1iY2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSGI8f7JF3pQrYwe1YkAuh3l7mRpozpPT6DVrBBFZb8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32852102/297072329/-643924767?refcode=em_fr_210723DEBT_n_lc_90do_5_ng_n_EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjgwMmMyYi1iY2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSGI8f7JF3pQrYwe1YkAuh3l7mRpozpPT6DVrBBFZb8=)**

clean_body: Youth are being crushed under the weight of student debt. | | = Friend, Student loan debt is the second-largest source of household debt, and it’s crippling entire communities. Black Americans hold twice as much student loan debt as their white counterparts, making student-loan cancellation a matter of racial justice as well as economic equality. In 2020, we helped elect President Biden and a Democratic majority in Congress in part because they vowed to address the student loan debt crisis. With over 45 million people in the US holding $1.6 trillion in student debt, it’s time they act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = The student loan debt crisis represents a life-altering burden for generations of Americans, and falls hardest on already marginalized communities of color. It’s time to cancel student debt. = Thanks for the support, Justin Atkins National Political Manager NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. =

name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: We Have to Stop Wasting Taxpayer Dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
We must stop wasting taxpayer dollars.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32852869/297076451/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzAwYWE0Ni1iZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnyTjkjZWgQdRE8kITHl8LXfChbewglSSK8mlmWRwlg=)
Dear Tennessean,
As elected officials, we have the responsibility to use Tennessee working families’ tax dollars with integrity, but my fellow GOP lawmakers in the House are doing the opposite and recklessly appropriating funds.
This month alone, we learned the GOP Supermajority had worked with Governor Lee to pass a budget that used taxpayer dollars to sponsor vacations for folks not even in Tennessee, buy Governor Lee a plane ticket to go south for a photo-op, and defend an abhorrent amount of lawsuits against the state. In fact, GOP lawmakers are going against our Constitution so frequently, they had to add a $7 million dollar line item to the budget just for legal defense.
[**We must stop wasting Tennessee tax dollars and start investing these monies into strategies to make life better for everyday Tennesseans. Can you contribute to our House Democratic Caucus campaign fund today to help us win back seats in the House and exercise our oath to appropriate tax dollars with integrity? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32852874/297076463/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzAwYWE0Ni1iZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnyTjkjZWgQdRE8kITHl8LXfChbewglSSK8mlmWRwlg=)
In this together,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32852878/297076494/-232183106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzAwYWE0Ni1iZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnyTjkjZWgQdRE8kITHl8LXfChbewglSSK8mlmWRwlg=)

Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

body:
As Ras travels across Iowa to hear from people about what they want and need from our state government, it’s clear that under current leadership, many feel like Iowa is moving backwards. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32862205/297103359/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210723eom1_tr_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzllZTNhZS1jZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMaWmBh7cqbp_vEJZf_QT2zi_Afe9erO_vFaQBsTm70=)
---
Friend, As Ras travels across Iowa to hear from people about what they want and need from our state government, it’s clear that under current leadership, many feel like Iowa is moving backwards. Just take a look at these three things Governor Kim Reynolds has prioritized recently:
1. She **sent Iowa state troopers to the southern U.S. border** on the taxpayers’ dime, instead of investing in things like our state’s schools and infrastructure.

2. She signed a bill **making it harder for Iowans to vote** by shortening early voting periods and cutting election day voting hours.

3. Rather than support our public schools, she signed a bill **making it easier for groups to form charter schools** without approval from local school boards.

[If you agree that Iowa needs new leadership to move our state forward, pitch in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32862207/297103364/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210723eom1_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzllZTNhZS1jZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMaWmBh7cqbp_vEJZf_QT2zi_Afe9erO_vFaQBsTm70=) These actions don’t serve the best interests or meet the basic needs of the people of Iowa — _they only serve an increasingly extreme political agenda that fails Iowans_. As Iowa’s next Governor, Ras will be bold about the basics: he plans to fully fund our public schools so they’re once again #1 in the nation, make it easier for voters to make their voices heard, and create more good-paying jobs so every Iowan can thrive. [Next year, we can replace Governor Reynolds and her broken political agenda with a leader for the people, but it requires putting in the work today. Can you chip in $10 or more to support Ras ahead of our July 31 fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32862211/297103366/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210723eom1_tr_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzllZTNhZS1jZWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bMaWmBh7cqbp_vEJZf_QT2zi_Afe9erO_vFaQBsTm70=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

There’s a lot to think about when running for office — or even

# [_PETITION: MORE JAIL TIME FOR JANUARY 6TH RIOTERS_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7325def9-d716-472a-9f73-0ddb2b11c61c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Hey -- did you see this crazy breaking news?? CBS NEWS: Capitol rioter gets eight months in prison in first felony sentencing from January 6 attack We’re so pissed. [We can’t believe the first convicted felon ONLY got 8 months in prison!! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T200dbc80-67e2-4d9a-bbba-dcb06939707e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Do you remember the damage they caused that day??

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Now they're saying vaccine booster?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGyQ0z&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVnmQwy&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/60988af5-6531-40c7-9291-8787282c527d.png]

Where does this stop?

Pfizer is planning on asking the FDA to authorize booster dose of COVID vaccine as talks of the Delta variant loom. Will the booster dose of the COVID vaccine be politicized and used as a tool to scare and pressure the public into allowing the government to continue to make choices for you?

But Loren, the government wouldn't do that...would they?

Biden's Health and Human Services Secretary Becerra stated in an interview with CNN, “it is absolutely the government’s business”to know whether you’ve been vaccinated. What happened to our constitutional rights? What happened to our HIPPA rights? Under Biden, civil servants shred the very documents they swore an oath to protect.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/ff16d3c4-7351-45e0-9c3f-35d9d2605363.jpg]

We don't want the feds on our property!

We have a right to our medical privacy, we have a right to be in our own yard and not have someone from the federal government stop by and violate the 4th amendment. As Americans, we do not tolerate tyranny.

I know you're angry, I am too.

Everyday Americans matter; you matter. It's time we stop this destruction of our nation. Stand with me, get involved, run for office, go to the school board meetings, stand with candidates that will have your back. Together we can "protect and defend" this nation we love.

It's time to stand up for America!

Loren

I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJnio&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EyGXwxP&]

THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJnvw&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=Et4dCnX&]

I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SiJnKT&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EVIQSge&]

Yup, the very same deal they spent the last three months negotiating with President Biden -- and now they refuse to even start the discussion in the Senate! **I’m sick of the obstruction. I’m going to say it until my voice goes hoarse: **We need to get rid of the filibuster so that we can pass overdue investments in American workers and families.** But apparently, I haven’t been loud enough. Senate Republicans are too busy hand-wringing over little details to see the big picture:_America’s working families are suffering, our infrastructure is crumbling, and we need support NOW._ The GOP is fighting tooth and nail against every inch of progress. And you can bet Mitch McConnell is thrilled that he can keep ruling over his “legislative graveyard” of a Senate even from the minority. Enough is enough. It’s time we take away Mitch’s favorite tool for obstruction and get to work -- and it starts right here in Ohio. [**Will you chip in a split donation to help me and Seth Moulton flip Ohio’s open Senate seat and FINALLY deliver the urgent, popular, and effective legislation the American people are demanding?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32864061/297112290/602283465?refcode=20210723_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmQ0ZDNhNS1kMmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2xx1b-6uHXC7EL0SPqv3UG7zqAunuFqrfzrgMNnauo=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32864062/297112291/-1665179247?refcode=20210723_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmQ0ZDNhNS1kMmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T2xx1b-6uHXC7EL0SPqv3UG7zqAunuFqrfzrgMNnauo=)
There’s still a path forward for the bipartisan infrastructure bill, if we’re willing to fight for it. And trust me, I’m going to fight like hell right now -- and then even harder as Ohio’s next Senator. \-- Tim Ryan

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Sen. Johnson requests information on Biden’s border crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Patriot,

We wanted to make sure you saw the latest news on Senator Johnson's efforts to get to the bottom of the Biden Border Crisis.
[
**_Fox News_**
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58492749:sw0CpzdNR:m:1:2068296031:58B72D1C63E23D92948AB59B8468A3B8:r)
Senator Johnson wrote a letter to Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Troy Miller to request data on "apprehensions of criminals, including confirmed gang members, at the southern border." As Senator Johnson said: **" This administration's failure to enact policies to address the crisis at the border has emboldened gang members to exploit these lax security measures, enter this country illegally, and threaten the safety of all Americans."**

Thanks to the border crisis created by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, illegal migrants are pouring into the U.S at a record pace. A staggering **188,829 illegal migrants** were encountered by U.S. border authorities in June -- a new 21-year record. Border state Republican governors are stepping up to protect their constituents, but securing our border should be a priority for the Biden Administration. It's critical to U.S. national security, ensuring safety in American communities, controlling the drug crisis, and so much more.

If you would like to get involved to help support Republicans like Senator Johnson who are doing everything they can to protect our national security, sign up to volunteer [**_here_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58492750:sw0CpzdNR:m:1:2068296031:58B72D1C63E23D92948AB59B8468A3B8:r). If you cannot volunteer, but would like to support our efforts financially, click [**_here_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58492751:sw0CpzdNR:m:1:2068296031:58B72D1C63E23D92948AB59B8468A3B8:r).
Thanks,

clean_body: Patriot, We wanted to make sure you saw the latest news on Senator Johnson's efforts to get to the bottom of the Biden Border Crisis. Senator Johnson wrote a letter to Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Troy Miller to request data on "apprehensions of criminals, including confirmed gang members, at the southern border." As Senator Johnson said: " This administration's failure to enact policies to address the crisis at the border has emboldened gang members to exploit these lax security measures, enter this country illegally, and threaten the safety of all Americans." Thanks to the border crisis created by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, illegal migrants are pouring into the U.S at a record pace. A staggering 188,829 illegal migrants were encountered by U.S. border authorities in June -- a new 21-year record. Border state Republican governors are stepping up to protect their constituents, but securing our border should be a priority for the Biden Administration. It's critical to U.S. national security, ensuring safety in American communities, controlling the drug crisis, and so much more. If you would like to get involved to help support Republicans like Senator Johnson who are doing everything they can to protect our national security, sign up to volunteer . If you cannot volunteer, but would like to support our efforts financially, click . Thanks, Team WisGOP This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system May 22, 2018. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I love America, do you?
body:
It breaks my heart to see our fellow Americans disgrace our flag. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c220%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=QLnflCQo0fycMRe8dsvfEQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4314%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6jiyLDjYYZsPezUhJkc6g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, It breaks my heart to see our fellow Americans disgrace our flag. Help me defend it. [**By donating $35 or more by 11:59 pm tonight, you will receive our “Stand Up For The Flag” shirt.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4325%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=upyu73LKRqMGBCgN5tuxTg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c1J5k81hlkQ2chJMcoxkOw&sysid=1) [**CLAIM MY T-SHIRT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4327%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p%2fvrBk41ZwKVele6UR8QwQ&sysid=1) If you recognize what a blessing it truly is to live in America, then this shirt is for you. As liberal athletes and celebrities tarnish our flag, Cuban and Hong Kong protestors champion the American flag as a symbol of freedom, hope, and democracy.
The Left wants us to hate our country and our flag. But I am proud of our country, our people, and, of course, our flag. That’s because **_even on our worst day, we are blessed to live in America._** [**CLAIM MY T-SHIRT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4327%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p%2fvrBk41ZwKVele6UR8QwQ&sysid=1) Today is the opening ceremony of the Tokyo Olympics and I want to celebrate American patriotism. [**Join me in showing your love for the American flag with your “Stand Up For The Flag” shirt.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4328%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rsg9cP7sktj27bYalvATkw&sysid=1) My very best, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4326%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c1J5k81hlkQ2chJMcoxkOw&sysid=1) Nikki R. Haley [**CLAIM MY T-SHIRT**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4329%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ArtNq%2brzsQQz9HpqilsINg&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4314%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6jiyLDjYYZsPezUhJkc6g&sysid=1) Founded by Ambassador Nikki Haley, Stand For America is an advocacy group promoting public policies that strengthen America’s economy, culture, and national security. (C) Stand For America | [www.standforamericanow.com](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4320%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LOOQClm0nteaDeyKevpqbg&sysid=1)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We're a bit behind on our goal for the month
#

Hey friend — I wanted to send you an update on our July fundraising progress.
Honestly, we're a bit behind on our goal for the month, and I was hoping you could pitch in.
We rely on donations from folks like you to fund our work to organize a huge coalition of folks supporting our fight for higher wages, green union jobs, justice reform, and more.
**Why? Because Malcolm is not taking a cent from corporate PACs, fossil fuels, or corporate lobbyists. Our campaign is powered by the PEOPLE.**
But to defeat our opponents who are taking money from corporate PACs, we've got to hit our fundraising goals. And right now, we're losing the momentum we need to hit our goal before the month comes to a close.
[We need 200 of Malcolm’s grassroots supporters to step up and make their first donation by midnight to catch up. Can you be one of them? name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Real results as we face the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
I am excited to champion aggressive legislation that takes concrete steps to combat climate change. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux1qKHOZkm1CNR5587tb51oSKuEIrHYfyEYzXcu-Be_4tzMww1bmMpKEMMUt3Z5nVQymwpFfYkNmlINcFm7T9CvaiSA1H2C27seHGmcX3QVSlWCycbHMjMzHUAGjc-gVe36_ebXSBeXqTZVDv4ZdMaEN1u6CdcGv6zEOixMVZwLmlpFLc7X_8vWUQMCKx5ogjYsqOcKLXQ0LlVyXcGDFt9tfVhxB6z80a6kENV0oKiXxQzZ6HCshdTFj2oQnoB_AeQ1dDmRMZngEDG45_9RrS_EnY-5csTKdzRN3C4X-8bMnbGEH8mlHO8ZStZRSgTYBcDPTc61eABpbPlB0t_Du8bGd9d9AbYFDLVydYUsdj5254uqDzzmFmxrn834khVmJuDg/3du/9CL1iamdTrqwg41J5SUmwA/h0/-FSJIYE92KCxaB2ZQ-X3Q_5aZgDrS8pnKD4S-JtCdwU)

| | Friend,

The call to reinvest in critical energy and water infrastructure can no longer be ignored.

Climate change threatens lives by repeatedly disrupting the safe delivery of vital services to families across the nation.

We need to ensure a cleaner, greener, affordable energy future for our country. Our power grids are outdated after decades of underinvestment.

**As Chair of the House Appropriations Subcommittee on Energy and Water Development, I am excited to champion aggressive legislation that takes concrete steps to combat climate change and keep families safe in their homes.**

For decades, I've worked to secure investments for the American people -- and this bill confronts the climate crisis while creating good-paying jobs in communities that have too often been left behind.

By investing in _clean energy_ and _workforce development_ , we can propel revitalization in communities along the Lake Erie shore and beyond while addressing major regional challenges nationally.

**[Our promise to the American people to Build Back Better is well underway, but we can’t afford to stop now. Can you chip in $20 to help our campaign deliver policies for working Americans and ensure a sustainable future for the Great Lakes?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdLFlqmtyf_jtqj-bA0azI-rlOP4WZJmYZTwNY6vhGVGhGIs12CYp9k03J89W2-iJh6UwD6mvni1OxwRNb-o-WaOWZCZPVve-Nj96IiATa92h_ri6yABXQfyd2izpT9JiMCSlMedIWvuHxQhAbKXQL1I8iUe1NtVHaJr4UsM7bhbsOPTqRNMNv8yk_6_HlzYL7zT-Yc42cQab-fHMpbVIkl1vjEStqFi723dQiTJW8LuufVk5GJY2X7GLC20EJXqI7eOdNJEmF8om4uD_GtJnZATEfpjbZMtTHZ113eYD-muJRMNxhiMxSt3QnHGab77BFWGoMMJN7Xx9WKczWFVhb0tWaUSao31nu3NKjyKZJmeI-3HK4IP8yiaYs0jGlTegMEXg7AYGbH9aaj7h6Dfk66w/3du/9CL1iamdTrqwg41J5SUmwA/h1/kh_txp4AL9NLSVDmpTaaHOQO4J7r1vV_c07JsRx3xLM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**Donate $10 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKKQ8_q_i-5MU1_3bqsfJJX0meJbWh3o6rhvK3xAjxZ4SR5DCd0rNkOlUuEe38yOG4a6r1KrvDJSAQ21_iM2THv2btPmsJD9xlqC2TnMhEyMrlEZq4F6gzPvo7QKTELZMoQSJkaS70gs9FPgDDa-MyU_tu177r1-_mNSz9oLzlFeqjOV-mi9DKsNEWdyCTSGempIHxGE_YSOVSBcczl5iTju73dcmsJOlwFrhhYnN7AIRndsesnNZW7jytQRDJSnHH1fZ0hyQcHyrHjKRjfRfGwjmc_iW43xgHmPPhhDDU05DF3axNk3lAqm68Ilk9EhiZUkPaelWK7k_ZV3JRuvprqomPGgVNW6mbuB4zBjNBP5-YQLCRT1J7Ux4vdsyOLC0BY1ZMOY6d1yEXQuSqpM9jl/3du/9CL1iamdTrqwg41J5SUmwA/h2/sNQGi7-Si9XradTt3VTC6cZZHFCnixaJGQa-_Fw2QuQ)

clean_body: I am excited to champion aggressive legislation that takes concrete steps to combat climate change. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, The call to reinvest in critical energy and water infrastructure can no longer be ignored. Climate change threatens lives by repeatedly disrupting the safe delivery of vital services to families across the nation. We need to ensure a cleaner, greener, affordable energy future for our country. Our power grids are outdated after decades of underinvestment. As Chair of the House Appropriations Subcommittee on Energy and Water Development, I am excited to champion aggressive legislation that takes concrete steps to combat climate change and keep families safe in their homes. For decades, I've worked to secure investments for the American people -- and this bill confronts the climate crisis while creating good-paying jobs in communities that have too often been left behind. By investing in clean energy and workforce development , we can propel revitalization in communities along the Lake Erie shore and beyond while addressing major regional challenges nationally. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, \-- Marcy Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . When Donald Trump endorsed Glenn Youngkin, he promised Glenn would “Make Virginia Great Again.”

In return, Glenn Youngkin is unapologetically embracing Trumpism.

Last week, tens of thousands of Wisconsin families received the first installment of monthly payments through the Child Tax Credit — part of the _American Rescue Plan_. These monthly payments will provide desperately needed financial support to millions of people across our country — _while ensuring that taxes won’t increase for those making less than $400,000 per year._ **Thanks to the Democratic Senate you helped elect, help is finally here.** But Senate Republicans like Wisconsin’s Ron Johnson voted unanimously against the bill. When asked about the Child Tax Credit, Johnson remarked, _"I just don’t like all of these credits, all of these special deals."_ _It's a disgrace for Johnson to say that helping working class Americans is a "special deal." He should be ashamed._ **Wisconsinites deserve better from their leadership. We’re fighting on the front lines in states like Wisconsin to defeat far-right Republicans like Ron Johnson. clean_body: | = Last week, tens of thousands of Wisconsin families received the first installment of monthly payments through the Child Tax Credit — part of the American Rescue Plan. These monthly payments will provide desperately needed financial support to millions of people across our country — while ensuring that taxes won’t increase for those making less than $400,000 per year. Thanks to the Democratic Senate you helped elect, help is finally here. But Senate Republicans like Wisconsin’s Ron Johnson voted unanimously against the bill. When asked about the Child Tax Credit, Johnson remarked, "I just don’t like all of these credits, all of these special deals." name: Patty Murray
subject: Tammy Duckworth & I are working to help Veterans start families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Our Veterans deserve the very best health care available -- including treatments that can help them start families when they want to.
#
Peter,
Our Veterans deserve the very best health care available -- including treatments that can help them start families when they want to.
Even though thousands of Veterans who served during the Iraq and Afghanistan wars sustained injuries that affected their ability to conceive, the Department of Veterans Affairs still fails to provide important fertility treatments for too many Veterans trying to start a family -- thanks in part to an outdated ban from 1992.
I’ve been working for nearly a decade to permanently repeal the ban on VA covering artificial reproductive technology services, such as IVF, and to expand fertility coverage for Veterans, and Tammy Duckworth -- herself a Veteran who has had two daughters with the help of IVF -- has been an essential ally in that fight.
**[Now, Tammy’s up for reelection and she needs our support. Can you chip in $5 now to keep Tammy in Washington fighting alongside us on this issue and on all our work to support Veterans and families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32867627/297125172/1225674563?refcode=pm_em_210723_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc0ZWZlNC1kY2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SS-EavpebLSQpFnCRGG50wC5SMgUDopSdr9M6ItWv3g=)**

Tammy is an essential voice in the Senate for Veterans and for all parents and families. She’s secured private spaces in airports for breastfeeding mothers, spoken out on paid family leave and so much more.
**[Will you join me in contributing $5 now to reelect Tammy Duckworth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32867629/297125174/1225674563?refcode=pm_em_210723_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc0ZWZlNC1kY2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SS-EavpebLSQpFnCRGG50wC5SMgUDopSdr9M6ItWv3g=)**
Thank you,
Patty

clean_body: Please confirm right away. | This is really troubling news, Peter. If this continues, Joe Biden’s Democrats are going to DESTROY our campaigns -- along with everything we love about America. But it’ll only works if everyone contributes -- including you.Can we rely on you, Peter? | | | | | | Remember, if EVERY Grassroots Republican gave just $35 it would be enough to close the fundraising gap. But if we fall ANY further behind in this race, we risk TOTAL DEFEAT. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Chief James Craig
subject: on Tucker Carlson Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r) | |
---
Peter,

This week, Tucker Carlson let the world know what the #1 governor's race in America is: Michigan.

In fact, that's why he invited me on his show.

We talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn._**

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan.**

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-167009](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57999649:JePx4BlN0:m:1:3253819041:3E0CBCDE0B5BC85FB80B7197A4FF7162:r)**

name: John McGuigan
subject: This antiquated stigma has to end:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32868216/297126921/-1233952322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y2Y2E2NC1kZmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epeq4CJGDrRy-CO7XW0G292z3HV0Pu1aYN65cuK7dII=&emci=9964cf76-ddeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9cf6ca64-dfeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)

| | Peter – This campaign is focused on allowing everyone to achieve their potential; that means we often talk about issues which don't grab many headlines. **Today, I want to highlight the dangerously overlooked problem of Period Poverty, which refers to inadequate access to menstrual hygiene tools and education.** The facts demand attention: _One in ten_ menstruating youths misses school during their period due to a lack of access to menstrual products and resources. But government benefits, such as the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) and the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC), do not cover the cost of these necessary supplies. As a result, people are often forced to rely on uncomfortable, unsanitary, or unsafe workarounds when they cannot access or afford new products. To make things worse, the antiquated, misogynistic stigma associated with menstruation can make it harder for folks to seek help, especially in schools, where students need to go to a teacher, nurse or other adult. Trans and nonbinary youth face additional obstacles and prejudices. **No one** should be the gatekeeper on these essential products! **As a Senator, I will prioritize making menstrual products free and readily available to anyone seeking them, especially in schools. Further, I will introduce legislation to prevent any state from collecting sales tax – essentially a period tax – on these products.** **[Head over to Facebook to get more information and join the conversation about how our movement can end this critical and tragically overlooked issue, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32868217/297126922/910871122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y2Y2E2NC1kZmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epeq4CJGDrRy-CO7XW0G292z3HV0Pu1aYN65cuK7dII=&emci=9964cf76-ddeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9cf6ca64-dfeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356)** _John_ [Join the conversation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32868218/297126923/910871122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y2Y2E2NC1kZmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Epeq4CJGDrRy-CO7XW0G292z3HV0Pu1aYN65cuK7dII=&emci=9964cf76-ddeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=9cf6ca64-dfeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18185356) |
