name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: In FL, we know a Commie when we see one
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
AOC is no different from Castro |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=64ef8358b3&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Florida is the beacon of freedom and hope for the world right now.

Even as Biden drags the rest of the country into an inflation-induced malaise like Carter did, Florida is providing hope that freedom and America First policies provide hope for a brighter future than AOC, Biden and the Communist Dems.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b01bb590ee&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who sides with AOC and her support for Communist Cuba, while really sticking it to Florida families. **

Soto campaigns as a moderate, but in reality he *hearts* AOC.

Here in Florida, we know Communist Cuba rather well. Millions of former Cubans fled Communism to come to Florida.

So when Cuba erupted in protest against the dictatorial Communist regime in Cuba, Floridians rose to support them. How could we not? _We saw better than anyone what Communism did to these people and their families._

**That is why I was infuriated when I saw AOC sticking up for Communist Cuba. Yup, it's true!**

_New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she is concerned that Republicans are laying the "groundwork for regime change" in Cuba.

Ocasio-Cortez was asked for her response to GOP lawmakers who have said the protests for freedom in Cuba are evidence that socialism and communism are flawed economic systems.

Ocasio-Cortez responded to members of her party arguing that the economic problems in Cuba, which is led by a communist regime, are about much more than sanctions.

"This issue is, it's not just one facet, but where the U.S. has historically been the most aggressive in and where, we, you know, in bringing up the embargo you're pointing to the U.S. role and U.S. actions because if you leave that gaping opening, my concern is that people are trying to lay the groundwork for regime change," Ocasio-Cortez said._

**So, Cuban Communist shock troopers are gunning down freedom protesters in the streets of Havana, but AOC thinks we need to defend the Cuban regime and lift sanctions on it?!?**

AOC is the typical out of touch modern Democrat: self-absorbed, historically ignorant, and Communist through and through.

Sadly, she's not alone.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=eed1cca986&e=afa21b7626)
---
| __**Washington, DC Mayor Bowser, a Democrat, actually ordered city workers to remove "Cuba Libre" from the street outside the Cuban Embassy!**__

_Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser’s administration has removed a slogan painted in front of the Cuban embassy supporting the Cuban protesters who have taken to the streets to oppose the country’s communist regime.

The message showed up on Friday and contained the phrase "Cuba Libre," which translates to "Free Cuba" and has often been used, especially on social media, to support the Cuban people who are currently clashing with Cuba’s government._

**And all this time, Darren Soto has NOT condemned wither AOC or Mayor Bowser. He doesn't stand with the free people of Cuba; he stands with the Communists!**

Florida Governor DeSantis knows better. He's not letting this be about "vaccines", as Biden claimed; or about sanctions. He knows it's a struggle against Communism, and that's what we have here in the U.S. as well!

_Governor Ron DeSantis who recently signed legislation into law that will mandate the teaching of the “evils of communism” in countries like Cuba in Florida schools says, “Florida supports the people of Cuba as they take to the streets against the tyrannical regime in Havana.”

“The Cuban dictatorship has repressed the people of Cuba for decades & is now trying to silence those who have the courage to speak out against its disastrous policies.”_

_[Help me get to Congress](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=50f573f6a7&e=afa21b7626), and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda. I'll mandate the teaching of the evils of Communism like Gov. DeSantis did. And I'll help the free people of Cuba by extending internet and cell service to the island so the protesters won't be shut down by Cuba's dictator!_

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. _He is a spineless career politician who wants NO PART of going up against me again!_

**He can't even condemn Communism, either here or abroad; I will fight for our freedoms, like Gov. DeSantis has done here in Florida!**

I won't back down, because [this is the year to take it back!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=79a406a0f8&e=afa21b7626) I'm fired up to go to DC and stand up to AOC and Marxism. [If you are too, then join me](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=69f3c22e8c&e=afa21b7626)!

The Dems must go! [Help me fight Communism here in America!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=33f2cfdd7b&e=afa21b7626)
---

clean_body: AOC is no different from Castro | | | | Hi Peter, Florida is the beacon of freedom and hope for the world right now. Even as Biden drags the rest of the country into an inflation-induced malaise like Carter did, Florida is providing hope that freedom and America First policies provide hope for a brighter future than AOC, Biden and the Communist Dems. My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet , Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who sides with AOC and her support for Communist Cuba, while really sticking it to Florida families. Soto campaigns as a moderate, but in reality he hearts AOC. Here in Florida, we know Communist Cuba rather well. Millions of former Cubans fled Communism to come to Florida. So when Cuba erupted in protest against the dictatorial Communist regime in Cuba, Floridians rose to support them. How could we not? We saw better than anyone what Communism did to these people and their families. That is why I was infuriated when I saw AOC sticking up for Communist Cuba. Yup, it's true! New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez says she is concerned that Republicans are laying the "groundwork for regime change" in Cuba. Ocasio-Cortez was asked for her response to GOP lawmakers who have said the protests for freedom in Cuba are evidence that socialism and communism are flawed economic systems. Ocasio-Cortez responded to members of her party arguing that the economic problems in Cuba, which is led by a communist regime, are about much more than sanctions. "This issue is, it's not just one facet, but where the U.S. has historically been the most aggressive in and where, we, you know, in bringing up the embargo you're pointing to the U.S. role and U.S. actions because if you leave that gaping opening, my concern is that people are trying to lay the groundwork for regime change," Ocasio-Cortez said. So, Cuban Communist shock troopers are gunning down freedom protesters in the streets of Havana, but AOC thinks we need to defend the Cuban regime and lift sanctions on it?!? AOC is the typical out of touch modern Democrat: self-absorbed, historically ignorant, and Communist through and through. Sadly, she's not alone. | | Washington, DC Mayor Bowser, a Democrat, actually ordered city workers to remove "Cuba Libre" from the street outside the Cuban Embassy! Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser’s administration has removed a slogan painted in front of the Cuban embassy supporting the Cuban protesters who have taken to the streets to oppose the country’s communist regime. The message showed up on Friday and contained the phrase "Cuba Libre," which translates to "Free Cuba" and has often been used, especially on social media, to support the Cuban people who are currently clashing with Cuba’s government. And all this time, Darren Soto has NOT condemned wither AOC or Mayor Bowser. He doesn't stand with the free people of Cuba; he stands with the Communists! Florida Governor DeSantis knows better. He's not letting this be about "vaccines", as Biden claimed; or about sanctions. He knows it's a struggle against Communism, and that's what we have here in the U.S. as well! Governor Ron DeSantis who recently signed legislation into law that will mandate the teaching of the “evils of communism” in countries like Cuba in Florida schools says, “Florida supports the people of Cuba as they take to the streets against the tyrannical regime in Havana.” “The Cuban dictatorship has repressed the people of Cuba for decades & is now trying to silence those who have the courage to speak out against its disastrous policies.” , and I'll aggressively push the America First agenda. I'll mandate the teaching of the evils of Communism like Gov. DeSantis did. And I'll help the free people of Cuba by extending internet and cell service to the island so the protesters won't be shut down by Cuba's dictator! I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Darren Soto. He is a spineless career politician who wants NO PART of going up against me again! He can't even condemn Communism, either here or abroad; I will fight for our freedoms, like Gov. DeSantis has done here in Florida! I won't back down, because I'm fired up to go to DC and stand up to AOC and Marxism. ! The Dems must go! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. body:

| Friend,
---
| Do you remember President Reagan's famous quote about the nine most terrifying words in the English language: **" I'm from the government, and I'm here to help"?** Well, welcome to 2021 in Joe Biden's America... because if he and Pelosi have their way, **the next knock at your door might be an inspector** , checking whether **you and your family have taken a Covid injection.** Can you imagine? **Door-to-door vaccine inspectors?_In America?_**

| Dr. Anthony Fauci dug the hole deeper by refusing to refute the preposterous claim, other than he says the vaccine inspectors would not be "federal" inspectors. The out-of-touch Dr. Fauci is once again missing the point. But Democrats in Washington have no shame, and they aren't backtracking an inch. In fact, their response to the outrage of conservatives and everyday Americans is to **target cellular providers** in an attempt to get them to **block (read: censor) text messages** that provide what they deem to be misinformation about the door-to-door proposal. Again, this is happening today, **in America.** I'm standing up against this nonsense, and **[I need your help TODAY to elect common sense conservative reinforcements to help.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RXu3S7BZjnn7h1lFaXduiQ/SvFBh7rpHGLO2Fc4Gn763sHw "I need your help TODAY to elect common sense conservative reinforcements to help.")** **[We are only FIVE seats away from winning the Speaker's gavel from Nancy Pelosi and stripping her unchecked power.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/RXu3S7BZjnn7h1lFaXduiQ/SvFBh7rpHGLO2Fc4Gn763sHw "We are only FIVE seats away from winning the Speaker’s gavel from Nancy Pelosi and stripping her unchecked power.")**

subject: Christine Olivo is a Future Generations Candidate!
body:
Christine is running bring true representation and environmental justice to Florida's 24th Congressional District! 🌊 🌎 ⛵ | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=5db28d1953&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
### **A MOVEMENT BUILDER FOR FLORIDA!**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9db83a4cf4&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
| **Christine Olivo, **wife, mother, and community organizer, was born in Miami and raised in El Portal, Florida. Her mother worked 2-3 jobs to give her children quality education, and her father, who immigrated from Haiti, was a strong believer in the entrepreneur spirit and the American Dream. Because her parents worked long hours to provide for their families, Christine and her siblings were mostly raised by her grandparents. Looking back at the struggles she experiences, Christine is reminded of her grandmother's words, "You will get us out of this."

Christine knows that the people of Florida's 24th Congressional District deserve better than a representative who only shows up for photo-ops, while the community struggles to thrive. Christine is fighting for common sense gun reform, Medicare for All, housing and environmental justice.
**[Will you donate $10 today DIRECTLY TO CHRISTINE?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=314000be3e&e=66979298f9) **
---
| [DONATE $10 NOW](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9791f00326&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $10 NOW")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c6f9b10696&e=66979298f9)
---
**_Christine is running in Florida's 24th Congressional District, where she has devoted her time and advocacy to help her community._**
| **WE CAN WIN FLORIDA'S 24TH WITH YOUR HELP**
When Katrina hit, Christine took a leave of absence from work to help with recovery and assistance efforts. Her servant-leadership has only grown since. She has been a voice in the community for over a decade. In her career as a Youth Director, she has developed a long history of fighting for children and families. Today, Christine mentors youth in her community, and has worked with Americorps developing 12-week parenting courses. Christine volunteers with the Florida Rights Coalition Resolution to assist citizens who have been incarcerated to register to vote, and supports the Haitian-American community through the Haitian American Voters Engagement Coalition, and is the newly elected Broward County Democratic Committeewoman.

Christine knows that no one gets ahead alone, and believes that the only path forward is a unified path. We must come together for the greater good of humanity. Her positions are clear. She believes that everyone deserves healthcare, everyone deserves better pay, everyone deserves a chance to live the American dream.
---
| [DONATE $10 NOW](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=363498e362&e=66979298f9 "DONATE $10 NOW")
---
| [VOLUNTEER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=b088df0d8e&e=66979298f9 "VOLUNTEER")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=76321d1364&e=66979298f9)
---
**Join Christine this weekend, July 24th, as 55 major cities across the US come together to advocate for Medicare for All.**
| [ATTEND ORLANDO M4ALL MARCH](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c3616315cd&e=66979298f9 "ATTEND ORLANDO M4ALL MARCH")
---
|
---
| We are proud to have Christine as a Future Generations candidate. We endorse candidates we know have a proven record and history of standing up for the most vulnerable, for their communities, and know that with them in Congress, a vote for the progress of the people of Florida's 24th District, will be _**a vote for all of us.**_

We've seen that given a great progressive candidate to vote for, we can build enthusiasm and we can win and WIN BIG!

**We can do** the same for Christine and can continue to expand in some of the most critical races in Florida as we did for 13 Texas candidates in 2020, for Senator Markey is Massachusetts, and now Congresswoman Cori Bush in Missouri.

**We can only do** with your support. [Will you split a donation with Christine and Future Generations?](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c35c1ca4df&e=66979298f9)
---
| [GIVE $7](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=76ac7d195d&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $7")
---
| [GIVE $20.22](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=43863e7e29&e=66979298f9 "GIVE $20.22")
---
| [GIVE OTHER](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=39ab04f8fa&e=66979298f9 "GIVE OTHER")
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7e9e5cc974&e=66979298f9)
---

Future Generations PACPO BOX 362PALO PINTO, TX 76484

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=984bb1896f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=984bb1896f).

name: John Fetterman
subject: 71% of the time it works every time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I don’t make the rules.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210723-2063-header&t=1&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)
Peter,
Let’s be real, it takes *a lot* of money to run for Senate and _win_.
The data doesn’t lie. According to ActBlue, small-dollar donations to U.S. Senate candidates increased by more than 219% from 2018 to 2020. **And during the 2020 election cycle, the top-spending U.S. Senate candidates — Republicans and Democrats — won their races 71% of the time.**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23394?refcode=em20210723-2063&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)
Yeah... Pretty much that, Peter. 👆
[**_I’m respectfully asking: Could you please donate $3, $5, $10 or another amount to help me build our campaign for U.S. Senate? A donation of any amount has a direct + immediate impact on what I’ll see in ActBlue later today._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23394?refcode=em20210723-2063&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23394?refcode=em20210723-2063&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)**
Look, I don’t make the rules. But candidates who raise a LOT of resources early on are just that much more likely to win. That’s exactly where Democrats failed when we tried to flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat back in 2016. Even though we lost by less than two points, we were outspent by like millions of dollars.
Now we have a real shot at building a top-spending, winning Senate campaign in 2022. And we're doing it the *right* way, through small-dollar online donations + no corporate PACs.
**But that means we’re also relying on people like Peter Willis in your state to occasionally donate to emails like this when ya can.** It’s so incredibly important.
[**_I’m wondering if you can donate $3, $5, $10 or another amount to our campaign today? Democratic fundraising traditionally tends to slow down during July, and we can’t afford to let that happen to our campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23394?refcode=em20210723-2063&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23394?refcode=em20210723-2063&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210723-2063-footer&t=25&refcode2=2063_434096_KatB_g&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2063%2E434096%2EKatB_g)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

That’s exactly where Democrats failed when we tried to flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat back in 2016. Even though we lost by less than two points, we were outspent by like millions of dollars. Now we have a real shot at building a top-spending, winning Senate campaign in 2022. And we're doing it the right way, through small-dollar online donations + no corporate PACs. But that means we’re also relying on people like Peter Willis in your state to occasionally donate to emails like this when ya can. It’s so incredibly important. Thanks for all you do, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

We absolutely love the Olympics and can't wait to watch the incredible athletes. I have to say, I was briefly on the swim team back in high school, but I realized pretty quickly that I wasn't exactly an Olympic contender... Congressman feels like a much better fit. In politics, our Olympics - the 2022 election - is still a ways away. But I'm starting to feel like our race here in California's 10th district is going to be the main event. What happens here is likely to decide who wins the House majority! So just like all the amazing athletes who qualified for these Olympics, we can't start training right before the games. We've got to prepare years ahead of time, and that's exactly what we're doing right now by building up our campaign and organizing early. clean_body: | | Folks, Pam and I are really excited to cheer on Team USA as we catch up on the opening ceremonies during Primetime coverage tonight! We absolutely love the Olympics and can't wait to watch the incredible athletes. I have to say, I was briefly on the swim team back in high school, but I realized pretty quickly that I wasn't exactly an Olympic contender... Congressman feels like a much better fit. In politics, our Olympics - the 2022 election - is still a ways away. But I'm starting to feel like our race here in California's 10th district is going to be the main event. What happens here is likely to decide who wins the House majority! So just like all the amazing athletes who qualified for these Olympics, we can't start training right before the games. We've got to prepare years ahead of time, and that's exactly what we're doing right now by building up our campaign and organizing early. Claim your medal as one of my biggest grassroots supporters today: And now it's time to watch the games! (and a special shoutout to all the Valley Olympians - we are so proud of you!) Go Team USA! 🇺🇸 Josh = =

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We talked about the the next big spending bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Bernie and I will not stop fighting for the working people of this country.
#
Peter,
There’s only one way forward — and it’s going big, bold, and fast to deliver for the people.
**I’m leading the charge with my friend Bernie Sanders for a big spending bill that expands Medicare, fights climate change, invests in working people, and so much more.** I even spoke with Bernie yesterday about the progressive priorities at the heart of this next bill that we’re working so hard on.
This package is bold and transformative and _Democratic._
We cannot waste any more time negotiating with Republicans and ending up back at square one where the GOP backs out and filibusters the bill. I know it. Bernie knows it. This movement knows it.
[**So now, I have to ask you to support Bernie and I in our fight for an ambitious bill that meets the crises of our moment. Chip in $3 right now to power our push for big, bold, fast action.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-484&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=484_420207_qaOU-M&akid=484%2E420207%2EqaOU-M)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-484&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=484_420207_qaOU-M&akid=484%2E420207%2EqaOU-M)**
We’re going to create green jobs and affordable housing, expand Medicare, and secure two years of free community college in this bill — so that we can pass a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, College for All, and more in the future.
**Can you stand with me and Bernie today in this mission?[Chip in a few bucks right now so we can get this big spending bill done for the people »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-484&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=484_420207_qaOU-M&akid=484%2E420207%2EqaOU-M)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210723-484-footer&t=22&refcode2=484_420207_qaOU-M&akid=484%2E420207%2EqaOU-M)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **- ****July 23, 2021-** **\- Message from the Chair on Indiana General Assembly's Redistricting Tour -** **** **\- American Jobs Plan Tour Continues Across Indiana -** Indiana Democrats have been meeting Hoosiers where they are to talk about why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan and a revitalized infrastructure system. Just this week, a new [CBS News](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32872791/297142231/1376221309?FFF.07.23.21=FFF.07.23.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZhYTQ3Yi1lYmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPEn4Q5H1qExN6sPOYFt76Ne_LsbTNo8ymkjFZvMEWA=&emci=7c89f1b5-e2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=896aa47b-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) poll showed once again that a majority of Americans - including Republicans - support President Biden's American Jobs Plan. Indiana Democrats support a better and brighter future for Indiana and Hoosier families. The American Jobs Plan is not a partisan plan, it's a pathway to better opportunity, and the time to do it is now. By passing the Jobs Plan, Indiana will be able to expand on broadband investments started by the American Rescue Plan, eliminate childcare dessers, and dismantle Indiana's "right to work" laws and its "work more for less" economy through the (PRO) Act. This opportunity is why Democrats are on baord to support the next stage of recovery: the American Jobs Plan. We're ready to build a better future and create better opportunities for our families, and we ask you to join us. Contact your county party to find an event near you and to learn more about why Indiana needs the Jobs Plan by [clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32872792/297142232/-1411826621?FFF.07.23.21=FFF.07.23.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZhYTQ3Yi1lYmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPEn4Q5H1qExN6sPOYFt76Ne_LsbTNo8ymkjFZvMEWA=&emci=7c89f1b5-e2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=896aa47b-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535). **\- Indiana Republicans Continue Fighting Against the Interests of Hoosiers ****-** As Indiana Democrats continue delivering for all Hoosiers across the state, the Indiana Republican Party has been doing everything possible to keep their "work more for less" economy intact. This week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republicans filed an appeal to reverse an order that allowed Hoosier workers - including gig and temporary workers - to receive unemployment benefits during the COVID-19 pandemic. Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have been guided by their partisanship when the facts say Hoosier workers just simply need to make more money. Indiana's workforce ranks 43rd in the nation, studies have shown more "good jobs" have left Indiana than what's come in, and Indiana Republicans simply refuse to listen to experts and raise the minimum wage for the state. Indiana Democrats want more for Indiana and Hoosier families, and it's why Democrats have called for the state to raise the minimum wage. Further, it's why Democrats are ready to deliver the American Jobs Plan for Indiana because this plan will create good-paying jobs, strengthen unions, and solve some of Indiana's most dire infrastructure needs. It's time elected leaders get serious about creating a better future for Indiana, and Democrats are ready to answer the call. **\- Opportunities -** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32872793/297142233/-1140133020?FFF.07.23.21=FFF.07.23.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZhYTQ3Yi1lYmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPEn4Q5H1qExN6sPOYFt76Ne_LsbTNo8ymkjFZvMEWA=&emci=7c89f1b5-e2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=896aa47b-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535)**[**Click here to sign up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32872794/297142234/-1140133020?FFF.07.23.21=FFF.07.23.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZhYTQ3Yi1lYmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPEn4Q5H1qExN6sPOYFt76Ne_LsbTNo8ymkjFZvMEWA=&emci=7c89f1b5-e2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=896aa47b-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535) **\- Fall Internship 2021 -** **** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates.
* * *
Benefits
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

* * *
Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

* * *
Qualifications Applications must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

* * *
Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible.
* * *
How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Email Lauren or call 317-231-7122 for more information. _**-Save the date-**_ **Bartholomew County Democratic Party:** [BC Democratic Women at the Columbus Farmer's Market](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32872795/297142235/-1664642187?acontext=%7B%22event_action_history%22%3A\[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&FFF.07.23.21=FFF.07.23.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZhYTQ3Yi1lYmViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FPEn4Q5H1qExN6sPOYFt76Ne_LsbTNo8ymkjFZvMEWA=&emci=7c89f1b5-e2eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=896aa47b-ebeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4925535), July 24, 9:00 - clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | - July 23, 2021- \- Message from the Chair on Indiana General Assembly's Redistricting Tour - ** \- American Jobs Plan Tour Continues Across Indiana - Indiana Democrats have been meeting Hoosiers where they are to talk about why Indiana needs the American Jobs Plan and a revitalized infrastructure system. Just this week, a new poll showed once again that a majority of Americans - including Republicans - support President Biden's American Jobs Plan. Indiana Democrats support a better and brighter future for Indiana and Hoosier families. The American Jobs Plan is not a partisan plan, it's a pathway to better opportunity, and the time to do it is now. By passing the Jobs Plan, Indiana will be able to expand on broadband investments started by the American Rescue Plan, eliminate childcare dessers, and dismantle Indiana's "right to work" laws and its "work more for less" economy through the (PRO) Act. This opportunity is why Democrats are on baord to support the next stage of recovery: the American Jobs Plan. We're ready to build a better future and create better opportunities for our families, and we ask you to join us. Contact your county party to find an event near you and to learn more about why Indiana needs the Jobs Plan by . \- Indiana Republicans Continue Fighting Against the Interests of Hoosiers **- As Indiana Democrats continue delivering for all Hoosiers across the state, the Indiana Republican Party has been doing everything possible to keep their "work more for less" economy intact. This week, Governor Eric Holcomb and Indiana Republicans filed an appeal to reverse an order that allowed Hoosier workers - including gig and temporary workers - to receive unemployment benefits during the COVID-19 pandemic. Holcomb and Indiana Republicans have been guided by their partisanship when the facts say Hoosier workers just simply need to make more money. Indiana's workforce ranks 43rd in the nation, studies have shown more "good jobs" have left Indiana than what's come in, and Indiana Republicans simply refuse to listen to experts and raise the minimum wage for the state. Indiana Democrats want more for Indiana and Hoosier families, and it's why Democrats have called for the state to raise the minimum wage. Further, it's why Democrats are ready to deliver the American Jobs Plan for Indiana because this plan will create good-paying jobs, strengthen unions, and solve some of Indiana's most dire infrastructure needs. It's time elected leaders get serious about creating a better future for Indiana, and Democrats are ready to answer the call. \- Opportunities - \- Fall Internship 2021 - ** The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applications must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once Start/End Dates and Schedule Applications for the Fall of 2021 are now being accepted until August 13, 2021 We are not currently accepting applications for the Spring of 2022. Fall interns must commit to working a minimum of 20 - 30 hours per week. The Party will be flexible on days and times, as well as start and end dates, to help accommodate class and work schedules of interns. This position has a monthly stipend but does not include travel reimbursement. Hybrid virtual/in-person opportunities are possible. How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. Fellow conservative,

Just days after I entered the race to take back our Republican Senate seat in Nevada, the Cook Political Report upgraded our race from "Likely Democrat" to "Lean Democrat."

**This is huge!!** Our campaign has already made a significant impact on our chances of retaking the Senate from the Democrats in 2022.

This is a major setback for the Nevada Democrats, but we’re still up against an intrenched incumbent with millions flowing in from radical Leftist out-of-state megadonors. [**We’re counting on donors like you to make this seat "Likely Republican."**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5bb633671f044c1690411847739ad791&_e=-cvYQbrvi6xceretA_KKlJxQ_Hc7E4jDcwpxSlHFVPG_YGbhdb3FqBGBAs5AWkQ0YN4hOoBQlLQBy95FhJkUZiyJcIuVxnwwedjEtExKER4E6T8P0368najq2VTCKSN--Es4L97ttwAkQOMqR5GpfDUFq1a-kZl_D4D7qD7_BbX-YUqGaYL6y1OhJn3qd0N5PyUtj-L9M8WHeAX-RRchgpP2RwirZKN2vg2nG5e3RvTahgcCOUgG4XKQ671PLUz7W4pY2f7e-ep2vdx6hSI_ySTeCkZFk0vDZVG0iHoPfSiAajTxYtk9VDb15n0HjU9cnLi6rrMfi3rS5xYOaHwOxpvSVYVL3Se30GtGgUY_bZYr3iwBQ8jFtMHXQRt630THVK6mRFtaYxWO60Cr3EQYOpypoUVg6k6FOGat_F3PDl8Z2hg5Q-pRiJlBY0SwUHwoL49fx5M__j7aue6OkLg2KA%3D%3D)

[**What we need now to take this seat out of the Democrat’s column is support from Conservatives like you**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5bb633671f044c1690411847739ad791&_e=-cvYQbrvi6xceretA_KKlJxQ_Hc7E4jDcwpxSlHFVPG_YGbhdb3FqBGBAs5AWkQ0YN4hOoBQlLQBy95FhJkUZiyJcIuVxnwwedjEtExKER4E6T8P0368najq2VTCKSN--Es4L97ttwAkQOMqR5GpfDUFq1a-kZl_D4D7qD7_BbX-YUqGaYL6y1OhJn3qd0N5PyUtj-L9M8WHeAX-RRchgpP2RwirZKN2vg2nG5e3RvTahgcCOUgG4XKQ671PLUz7_yEQTPrsaz9RGRDNHO5NkD3nGxukZqUYrZzCHVHDZiU8SaigZCvqg-8XVZYHk3X3ZUS_pWrynJrXAsGabxltkYikrd6VyrqJSnNoRXUujKeoHsotgC-9YmNXittUPOpLMKv_gtRwOiJ8T6wJlcB-77ZF4vHlbBGgJWz0O4p9gJcjwk5UFgAQliKb4fnxjboHmLpcFZAC5z2b1FRXVddV8Q%3D%3D) to help us get our winning message to every single Nevada voter!

This announcement has put Chuck Schumer and ever Democrat megadonor in the Country on notice about our race. Millions are about to flood in to tear me down and salvage this seat. We can't allow a manipulative representative like Mike Garcia to continue to represent us. Peter, turns out Dr. Fauci has some friends in big tech.

After I questioned him on his blatant lies about NIH funding for gain of function research, Google came after me! They took down my videos that detail the entire paper trail of Fauci's involvement with funding the Wuhan lab. They called it "medical misinformation!"
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000783:JFI5RBlNJ:m:1:3253819041:87E2FA95E4986E781A6E77C72040ADE0:r)
This is ridiculous.

✅ I used basic NIH definitions of gain of function research.
✅ I provided documentation.
✅ I presented the facts.

**_And Google responds with ... censorship. _**

These are wild times, Peter. These big tech giants are willing to work as an arm of the federal government to protect the bureaucracy. **Free speech be damned.**

_Fighting for the truth has truly never been more difficult or more important._

And I need you fighting with me.

Please chip in today to fight this censorship and help me hold Dr. Fauci accountable: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2627905/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000783:JFI5RBlNJ:m:1:3253819041:87E2FA95E4986E781A6E77C72040ADE0:r)**
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
**US Sen. Ron Johnson: 'I may not be the best candidate' for 2022**
_— Wisconsin State Journal_
Ron Johnson sees the writing on the wall, Peter, but here’s the tough news: He outraised every Democrat in the race last quarter. He’s got a massive corporate donor network just a phone call away, Donald Trump’s full support, and seven figures in the bank.

Peter, that is a substantial amount of money and resources -- and when combined with the $28 million Mitch McConnell and national Republicans raised to take back the Senate in Q2, it will almost certainly be used to attack Democrats like Sarah Godlewski.

With _The Cook Political Report_ moving Wisconsin’s Senate race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up and _CNN_ calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP senator up in 2022 -- everything we do in these critical early months will matter a great deal for the success of our movement.

We need to be running at full capacity in this extremely competitive race, and the bottom line is that our fundraising has to pick up significantly before the end of the month if we're going to have the resources to fight back.

Sarah Godlewski is counting on you. What do you say?

[**Add a small $5 donation to our grassroots campaign today to make sure we have the resources to counter Republican attacks and defeat Ron Johnson. Anything you can pitch in will make a real difference. clean_body: US Sen. Ron Johnson: 'I may not be the best candidate' for 2022 — Wisconsin State Journal Ron Johnson sees the writing on the wall, Peter, but here’s the tough news: He outraised every Democrat in the race last quarter. He’s got a massive corporate donor network just a phone call away, Donald Trump’s full support, and seven figures in the bank. Peter, that is a substantial amount of money and resources -- and when combined with the $28 million Mitch McConnell and national Republicans raised to take back the Senate in Q2, it will almost certainly be used to attack Democrats like Sarah Godlewski. With The Cook Political Report moving Wisconsin’s Senate race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up and CNN calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable incumbent GOP senator up in 2022 -- everything we do in these critical early months will matter a great deal for the success of our movement. We need to be running at full capacity in this extremely competitive race, and the bottom line is that our fundraising has to pick up significantly before the end of the month if we're going to have the resources to fight back. Sarah Godlewski is counting on you. What do you say? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for being a critical part of the team, Peter. We're so close to getting rid of this guy and finally electing new leadership to the U.S. Senate. And when we do, it will all be thanks to contributions from grassroots supporters just like you. You’re the best. — Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | = If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, pleasemailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com. Folks, Clean water is a human right. And yet many Tribal communities in our country don’t have access to it. It’s shameful. Martin has introduced legislation, alongside Senator Michael Bennet, to finally ensure that all families in Indian Country have access to clean water. [**Will you sign our petition to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Tribal Access to Clean Water Act_? We need as many folks as possible to speak up to help get this passed.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32873918/297146826/-1432319842?refcode=MTH_em_20210723_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWEwMjI4OC1mMGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxbaAToXBDXzu4V_0vVd71KRevBlsed0AXHiZ75KO68=&emci=310f42c3-e4eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e1a02288-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32873919/297146828/-1432319842?refcode=MTH_em_20210723_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWEwMjI4OC1mMGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxbaAToXBDXzu4V_0vVd71KRevBlsed0AXHiZ75KO68=&emci=310f42c3-e4eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e1a02288-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

A lack of access to clean water can have harmful effects on a community’s health, education, economic development, and so many other parts of folks’ everyday lives.
This is especially concerning when you consider that **more than half of Native American households** can’t access reliable sources of clean drinking water.
It’s up to all of us to make sure it doesn’t stay this way. Martin’s _Tribal Access to Clean Water Act_ would provide funding to address the major backlog of water infrastructure projects in Tribal communities. It would change lives and livelihoods for the better.
[**That’s why we’re hoping you’ll become a citizen co-sponsor of this crucial legislation and help bring clean water to Tribal communities across the country. Please sign the petition today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32873921/297146829/-1432319842?refcode=MTH_em_20210723_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_TH_v3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWEwMjI4OC1mMGViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxbaAToXBDXzu4V_0vVd71KRevBlsed0AXHiZ75KO68=&emci=310f42c3-e4eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=e1a02288-f0eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Bad News from CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-july21?refcode=em210723-1-15&t=1&refcode2=996_6688874_SLnubt&akid=996%2E6688874%2ESLnubt)

Friends — Georgia and Arizona are ground zero for our fight to keep control of the Senate, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand:
**FIRST:** Our people-powered campaigns defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and Arizona — and the Senate for Democrats.
**THEN:** Republican groups took to the airwaves and the internet to attack me and Mark Kelly for doing our jobs and representing the people of Georgia and Arizona.
**NOW:** CNN named us two of the ten most likely Senate seats to flip in 2022, and _we are the only two Democratic incumbents in the top five so we have to be prepared to hold these seats._
With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat for Mitch McConnell to take back power, and they're coming after me and Mark as their top targets for defeat. We can't protect these battleground seats without your urgent grassroots support.
[**So please, friend: Will you split a donation of $10 or more between our campaign and Mark Kelly’s so we can work together to defend these seats in Georgia and Arizona and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-july21?refcode=em210723-1-15&t=2&refcode2=996_6688874_SLnubt&akid=996%2E6688874%2ESLnubt)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-july21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210723-1-15&t=15&refcode2=996_6688874_SLnubt&akid=996%2E6688874%2ESLnubt)**

clean_body: Friends — Georgia and Arizona are ground zero for our fight to keep control of the Senate, so I need you to read this critical update about where things stand: FIRST: Our people-powered campaigns defied the polls and pundits by turning out in historic numbers to flip Georgia and Arizona — and the Senate for Democrats. THEN: Republican groups took to the airwaves and the internet to attack me and Mark Kelly for doing our jobs and representing the people of Georgia and Arizona. NOW: CNN named us two of the ten most likely Senate seats to flip in 2022, and we are the only two Democratic incumbents in the top five so we have to be prepared to hold these seats. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just ONE seat for Mitch McConnell to take back power, and they're coming after me and Mark as their top targets for defeat. We can't protect these battleground seats without your urgent grassroots support. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks for being a part of this team. — Raphael Warnock Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Progress on holding airlines accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=WhwUXE7i%2FPwwCZtrBsehae%2F8xZA2J8Jx&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Recently, many of you joined me in speaking out against airlines short-changing consumers - practices such as refusing to provide pandemic refunds for delayed baggage or unprovided services are unacceptable.
Well, I have some good news to share: The Biden administration heard us loud and clear. The President has now issued an executive order directing the Department of Transportation to issue rules that will force airlines to refund fees for services that were delayed or not delivered.
When we raise our voices together and fight for issues that matter - issues that impact the lives of everyday Americans - we win. _Your_ dedication and _your_ communication motivate me even more to represent _you._
While President Biden's action will help stem the tide of these chronic bad practices - and, importantly, put dollars back into consumers' pockets - I know there's much more work to do. That's why I'll continue to work with Senator Markey and others to push for legislative solutions that hold airlines accountable and ensure they do right by consumers. We must keep pushing for cash refunds and non-expiring credits for canceled flights. This is the bare minimum for fairness and respect for flyers.
**In light of this victory and the progress we still need to make, I have a simple request:[Will you sign my card thanking President Biden for his action and encouraging further measures to hold airlines accountable and protect consumers? As you have seen, your voice matters in making change happen, so please do join me. ](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-thank-you?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1056-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1056-su-nd)**
[ SIGN ON](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-airlines-thank-you?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1056-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1056-su-nd)
Thank you so much for continuing to speak out. You're helping me move the needle, and I'm so grateful for your support.
Dick

subject: One click poll for dpwillis67@gmail.com.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
We need a few more responses, and we’re hoping you can be one of them.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32875309/297152809/-1572630612?refcode=em_surv_2021.07.23_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU0MGRhMC1mM2ViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGq_RFms5y08rfxfMnueXxDWoVtz3yo_PkQdhivl-Io=)**
Hey there,

Infrastructure is key to a growing economy, and Tom is committed to building better infrastructure in Arizona.

Highways, roads, and even water supplies are essential to a thriving Arizona economy. Investing in these resources now is how we’re going to build for the future, especially in rural Arizona, where many lack updated and modern infrastructure.

Tom has been advocating for the American Jobs Plan in Congress, and talking to folks across Arizona about infrastructure. But we want to know what you think, friend.

subject: The Squad’s silence speaks volumes
body:
Generally, when there is a social uprising of any sort, the ‘Squad’ is the first to run to social media.
---

| Friend,

Generally, when there is a social uprising of any sort, the 'Squad' is the first to run to social media. They will post about how they support people that are standing up to the government. However, we are seeing a very silent 'Squad' as the protests against the Cuban government continue.
Why? Because the Cuban government shares the same absurd socialist ideology that the Squad has. They want to see this ideology take hold in our country as both Cuba and Venezuela are on the verge of collapse. It's time for America to get serious about socialism and send these radicals home!

clean_body: Generally, when there is a social uprising of any sort, the ‘Squad’ is the first to run to social media. | | | | | | == | Friend, Generally, when there is a social uprising of any sort, the 'Squad' is the first to run to social media. They will post about how they support people that are standing up to the government. However, we are seeing a very silent 'Squad' as the protests against the Cuban government continue. Why? Because the Cuban government shares the same absurd socialist ideology that the Squad has. They want to see this ideology take hold in our country as both Cuba and Venezuela are on the verge of collapse. It's time for America to get serious about socialism and send these radicals home! | | | == | == | The 'Squad' should support the people of Cuba standing up to the Communist dictatorship that has created an economic crisis and prevented everyday Cubans from pursuing their happiness. They should know this is what they are trying to create here in America. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Talib, and Cori Bush are all card-carrying members of the Democratic Socialist of America, which has also been silent throughout the protests in Cuba. The people of Cuba are fighting for their freedom in the streets as socialists in America continue to push this failed ideology on the American people. Enough is enough, we need to stand up for the American way and ensure that our great nation is put first! == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | For Florida, Team Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Sharif Street
subject: I'm so proud of this endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARIF STREET FOR PA
body:
As a proud son of Pennsylvania--a state founded as a refuge for religious freedom and expression--and proud Muslim American, I was deeply disturbed by the physical assault against a Muslim American high school student in Montgomery County this spring. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32875867/297154584/902632477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGJiOTBjMi1mNWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gWHBDbj1Gv4zoGn_W3aCmnfF4bRvdfF17yR--vtYTU=&emci=2b6f3a41-d5e8-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=88bb90c2-f5eb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15053672) | Dear Friends, As a proud son of Pennsylvania -- a state founded as a refuge for religious freedom and expression -- and proud Muslim American, I was deeply disturbed by the physical assault against a Muslim American high school student in Montgomery County this spring. This past week, I joined with community members in support of this student, and to protest her continued victimization by school officials and local law enforcement. **Our faith is very meaningful and important to me and my family, as it is to many Pennsylvanians.** I believe that the role of faith in our lives is a common value that unifies diverse communities and people across the Commonwealth. This incident of hate is an affront to who we are as Pennsylvanians, despite whatever differences we may have. **This is why I am so deeply honored and grateful to have the support of Emgage PAC, the leading national Muslim advocacy group, as I consider a candidacy for U.S. Senate.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32875868/297154585/-1172984455?refcode=E10258-20210720-Emgage-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGJiOTBjMi1mNWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gWHBDbj1Gv4zoGn_W3aCmnfF4bRvdfF17yR--vtYTU=) “Sharif Street’s record of accomplishment as a community organizer, attorney and legislator in advancing social, economic and racial justice and equality is unmatched in this race, and we are honored to support Sharif Street for U.S. Senate,” said Abdul Mughees Chaudhri, chair of eMgage PAC Pennsylvania. Our religious freedom, our right to vote, our democracy, cannot be taken for granted. As we learn every day, these rights need to be vigilantly protected and defended. Emgage is doing tremendous work in advancing the cause of religious freedom and tolerance that protects all people of all faiths. [**To protect their work, however, they need legislators as committed to defending these rights as they are. I strive to do this, but I can't reach Congress alone; can I count on you to contribute to this mission today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32875869/297154586/466275692?refcode=E10258-20210720-Emgage-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGJiOTBjMi1mNWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gWHBDbj1Gv4zoGn_W3aCmnfF4bRvdfF17yR--vtYTU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

“Pennsylvania needs leaders in Washington who have proven themselves in understanding the challenges of the future, and who are committed to representing the best interests of all Pennsylvanians,” Chaudhri said. I am grateful for the faith of Emgage and individuals like you who trust in my ability to be what PA needs.
Thank you for demonstrating that tolerance, openness and love is what guides our state, not hateful bigotry. [**With your support, we can spread this message of tolerance and kindness within the halls of Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32875876/297154593/466275692?refcode=E10258-20210720-Emgage-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGJiOTBjMi1mNWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gWHBDbj1Gv4zoGn_W3aCmnfF4bRvdfF17yR--vtYTU=)

clean_body: As a proud son of Pennsylvania--a state founded as a refuge for religious freedom and expression--and proud Muslim American, I was deeply disturbed by the physical assault against a Muslim American high school student in Montgomery County this spring. | | Dear Friends, As a proud son of Pennsylvania -- a state founded as a refuge for religious freedom and expression -- and proud Muslim American, I was deeply disturbed by the physical assault against a Muslim American high school student in Montgomery County this spring. This past week, I joined with community members in support of this student, and to protest her continued victimization by school officials and local law enforcement. Our faith is very meaningful and important to me and my family, as it is to many Pennsylvanians. I believe that the role of faith in our lives is a common value that unifies diverse communities and people across the Commonwealth. This incident of hate is an affront to who we are as Pennsylvanians, despite whatever differences we may have. This is why I am so deeply honored and grateful to have the support of Emgage PAC, the leading national Muslim advocacy group, as I consider a candidacy for U.S. Senate. = “Sharif Street’s record of accomplishment as a community organizer, attorney and legislator in advancing social, economic and racial justice and equality is unmatched in this race, and we are honored to support Sharif Street for U.S. Senate,” said Abdul Mughees Chaudhri, chair of eMgage PAC Pennsylvania. Our religious freedom, our right to vote, our democracy, cannot be taken for granted. As we learn every day, these rights need to be vigilantly protected and defended. Emgage is doing tremendous work in advancing the cause of religious freedom and tolerance that protects all people of all faiths. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = “Pennsylvania needs leaders in Washington who have proven themselves in understanding the challenges of the future, and who are committed to representing the best interests of all Pennsylvanians,” Chaudhri said. I am grateful for the faith of Emgage and individuals like you who trust in my ability to be what PA needs. Thank you for demonstrating that tolerance, openness and love is what guides our state, not hateful bigotry. = I can't wait to work for you! \--- Sharif Street Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! **, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: We can't just return to pre-pandemic "normal"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

I've spoken with folks from across the region, and it's clear that people have been struggling to make ends meet long before the COVID-19 pandemic began. The deadly virus and economic crisis only exacerbated the hardships folks were already facing.

Part of the problem is that support from the federal government has been lagging for the past 40 years. It's past time workers, small businesses, and families get the help and resources they need to be successful.

That's why I'm thrilled to join Senator Coons and Representative Jaime Herrera Beutler in introducing the Rebuilding Economies and Creating Opportunities for More People Everywhere to Excel Act (RECOMPETE Act). The RECOMPETE Act will help create economic opportunity in distressed communities by providing flexible, 10-year federal grants.

Grants could be used for infrastructure investments, brownfield redevelopment, workforce development, small business assistance, resources to connect residents to opportunities, and other investments to help communities rebuild.

**The RECOMPETE Act is part of our goal to rebuild our country back _better_ \-- not just to return to pre-pandemic "normalcy."** The RECOMPETE Act will have a positive impact in places across our country and in our region and ensure we do a better job of protecting workers and communities so that no one gets left behind.

**[This legislation is a bold step forward in rebuilding back better and stronger, and I need to know I have your support, Peter. Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the RECOMPETE Act? Show your support for bold legislation to create economic opportunity by adding your name today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2UbCofFy_VZrOJl41BoE9_zu-bEBroPUp5YMF5iwLe0=/RLb76g9wxhzqVsadhGGwL4KkrbT6r572rDtupgu3d1c=?gpsid=50_115_19873&ms=em21_210723_Recmpt_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210723_Recmpt_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210723_Recmpt_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2UbCofFy_VZrOJl41BoE9_zu-bEBroPUp5YMF5iwLe0=/YgaBkk6QCihiulRW4YYAu76EP0uLf4ETxbkPJHzisq4=?gpsid=50_115_19875&refcode=em21_210723_Recmpt_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210723_Recmpt_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

It’s clear the kind of company Lisa Scheller keeps — and they’re not the people who have our district’s best interests in mind.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32877620/297160301/-1331439018?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210723-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWEyOTdlNC1mYWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnwx9iLQz_oPmL4qTRBeruaU1hutO9lQMh0zfjccMRQ=)

| Peter,

In 2020, Susan won one of the closest races in the country against Republican Lisa Scheller — and now they’re facing off again. Let’s take a look at some of Lisa Scheller’s biggest donors:
* **Ron Weiser** , former chair of the Michigan GOP — you may remember him from his questionable use of party funds that led to an official campaign finance complaint and a $200,000 fine. If that doesn’t ring a bell, maybe you’re familiar with his comments calling Michigan Democrats Governor Gretchen Whitmer, Secretary of State Jocelyn Benson, and Attorney General Dana Nessel “witches” and referencing “assassination” as a way to get them out of office.

* **Josh Eisen** , former Congressional candidate, who has been accused of numerous counts of stalking, harassment, use of racial slurs and anti-Semitic language, and threatening his legal opponents.

* **Carol Miller** , the West Virginia Congresswoman who is a vocal critic of President Biden’s infrastructure plan, voted not to impeach Donald Trump even after the January 6th insurrection, and is currently serving as the National Republican Congressional Committee recruitment chair.

* **Dan Meuser** , the Representative for PA-09, who voted against the American Rescue Plan for Covid-19 relief and is a strong Trump ally.

It’s clear the kind of company Lisa Scheller keeps — and they’re not the people who have our district’s best interests in mind. **That’s why we need to re-elect Susan Wild, who will never stop fighting for Pennsylvania families and workers.[_Can you chip in now to keep Susan in office and keep the House blue in 2022?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32877621/297160302/-1930076705?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210723-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWEyOTdlNC1mYWViLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fnwx9iLQz_oPmL4qTRBeruaU1hutO9lQMh0zfjccMRQ=)**

name: Rebecca Rodriguez
subject: Slowdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is counting on us.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210723-2298-header&t=1&akid=2298%2E2526796%2EpRufoF)
Hi, it’s Rebecca, Alexandria’s Campaign Manager. I wanted to share what’s been giving our team some pause this month and how you can help.
Every year, the same thing tends to happen: Campaign fundraising slows down during the summer months, particularly in July. **And this month has been no exception.**
I totally get it — folks are enjoying summer activities and taking long-awaited trips. **But our work doesn’t slow down in the summer.** With our new Homework Helpers summer tutoring series and in-person Green New Deal canvasses launching, we’re busier than ever.
On top of that, Congress continues to debate major spending bills and Alexandria is working to demand that any package meets the scale of the overlapping crises our country faces. **All of this work takes real resources, and we’re currently falling behind our goals for the month.**
Our campaign relies on grassroots donations from emails like this one to make all of this work possible. [Can you please help our campaign get on track for July with a donation today? $3 or anything you could pitch in would make a significant difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-2298-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2298_2526796_pRufoF&akid=2298%2E2526796%2EpRufoF)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-2298-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2298_2526796_pRufoF&akid=2298%2E2526796%2EpRufoF)**
Thank you for stepping up in this crucial moment.
Rebecca Rodriguez
Campaign Manager
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210723?refcode=em20210723-2298-P&t=22&refcode2=2298_2526796_pRufoF&akid=2298%2E2526796%2EpRufoF)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210723-2298-P&t=23&akid=2298%2E2526796%2EpRufoF)**

subject: Are you excited for the Olympics?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|

| | Hi Peter,

The eyes of the world are on Tokyo as athletes gather to compete at the Olympic Games.

After a year of delays due to the COVID-19 pandemic, I am so excited to watch the US Team represent our country on the world stage. **But first, I want to hear from you.**

[**_I want to know which events and athletes you’re looking forward to seeing at the Olympics. Will you take our Olympics survey?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32879713/297166913/-1417694992?refcode=MT_EM_EN_6MO_210723_1_1&refcode2=0bf3e0b4-02ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmYzZTBiNC0wMmVjLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ou4CEPgHdbf_dmGrTQyiP35zPuaK1xtI1WnxmA24U7Q=&emci=e60f72d2-eaeb-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0bf3e0b4-02ec-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2678920)

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: The mob came for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
People can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party?

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a13b487025d74432aa2d1cc130e91d8e&_e=TrK32NqTQni2nXCsxt982RIbGaUgS4UvX1d3rVS0rizc61LpebIyhd9gs84v2uulEW60mhOVlAqHySF6268wIz7ytEp46_DhK4wWvw0maVhLFANeMIbaov859apq5ceoYVPCoVVcnnxIgPZQSQ9eyuC6j5sFdWWhMTUHW9TJ6-Wp82NlSMpiB80OPF_mNQlKtkjG0LFHWlo1UaXOYNS9jG5YBcGl6xh6KE8vIT1u5r52bZKPAYMZob9VL87NtEwa8bWhKFYK54Duujcxzd2ynm0YOfYE7M5nRQbgPBQ5NFiVliy7idApWlAxUObsQbhmtuGVU9CHcAreYrM3mV1KuOWEN4X5uUv79dibIsEUULzz7ksE_kScPbuB3Ix1C5hAQRg3L4wKumGSswHa3tyH430d9_9qbgo1l7bEmYG2gNo%3D)
---

Peter,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a13b487025d74432aa2d1cc130e91d8e&_e=TrK32NqTQni2nXCsxt982RIbGaUgS4UvX1d3rVS0rizc61LpebIyhd9gs84v2uulEW60mhOVlAqHySF6268wIz7ytEp46_DhK4wWvw0maVhLFANeMIbaov859apq5ceoYVPCoVVcnnxIgPZQSQ9eyuC6j5sFdWWhMTUHW9TJ6-Wp82NlSMpiB80OPF_mNQlKtkjG0LFHWlo1UaXOYNS9jL8yw_AK_bDteSnlA_pjykBEUzVay--sEg-NEe75_8cMg_MfB8LIPfJEok5pafqxzydY9dMY-iw4TTypLfonHBzZ0D_WgjDSRJYeOFQ2zImwfwaR6Bg7Tf4vtJHvroaRdNjX6ILM8yeWoUe6h2CPk74InPzXbKPykA_1R_jszpFgD_I6PaEkAorzO_MoHk62vPBegLwRgRZVuTn3QLZakdc%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a13b487025d74432aa2d1cc130e91d8e&_e=TrK32NqTQni2nXCsxt982RIbGaUgS4UvX1d3rVS0rizc61LpebIyhd9gs84v2uulEW60mhOVlAqHySF6268wIz7ytEp46_DhK4wWvw0maVhLFANeMIbaov859apq5ceoYVPCoVVcnnxIgPZQSQ9eyuC6j5sFdWWhMTUHW9TJ6-Wp82NlSMpiB80OPF_mNQlKtkjG0LFHWlo1UaXOYNS9jM5eWyuK-MBD-eSYvsSOGyCXqYRmBNbWOb1-WLSU7cVsbVELb18mNbrPdYXWkeU6SL44-aMGETwErAYBg7lzLHN_-ILUs3WNLXDM3tR2Sngpe-2J231RS9OWXCW5X2MvCwubmndG_tel_Sg1y65QFMr-JW4hDLCIoqsTvIRTa657A5sqcjmra2Lm0MG2vyloA6GjJNwR4ToHHIN-rj9IWhc%3D)

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

****

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a13b487025d74432aa2d1cc130e91d8e&_e=TrK32NqTQni2nXCsxt982RIbGaUgS4UvX1d3rVS0rizc61LpebIyhd9gs84v2uulEW60mhOVlAqHySF6268wIz7ytEp46_DhK4wWvw0maVhLFANeMIbaov859apq5ceoYVPCoVVcnnxIgPZQSQ9eyuC6j5sFdWWhMTUHW9TJ6-Wp82NlSMpiB80OPF_mNQlKtkjG0LFHWlo1UaXOYNS9jDhWDTRup3aOEJCf5HuM0H91Q4o8-mYaGXakyqJA7i9IW0XHlIZq2JY0wbvhvRSKFifHt0jeOXM65cf33T6Nd2ghrArq-f_UsbfrtBW_wkTh88_3A6THymorFBEcPeJnDuscNb7TjHASsUYQZI_AMLBRE5Vd2fqMJ_IJq8PXiSW10F_9zJzlHFzOg9Bc3ruiz6lYMFioqlJ9cgdWcOkfiwo%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO »](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a13b487025d74432aa2d1cc130e91d8e&_e=TrK32NqTQni2nXCsxt982RIbGaUgS4UvX1d3rVS0rizc61LpebIyhd9gs84v2uulEW60mhOVlAqHySF6268wIz7ytEp46_DhK4wWvw0maVhLFANeMIbaov859apq5ceoYVPCoVVcnnxIgPZQSQ9eyuC6j5sFdWWhMTUHW9TJ6-Wp82NlSMpiB80OPF_mNQlKtkjG0LFHWlo1UaXOYNS9jO943Wh1ogxiHF3yfncH7owYtZhxIX-PWU6_N_YOuVp-um-tm6pbX2izBIVUjzdzp3_O1mcVT1B9OXKtBeK-EAry1O3UOvR3wqthLZik5CdL522iUhgaB1qUzJNpiUi1grppeqTa_E8NetUmwKByIwLvZXl8MCt2hVK5R09HbvRL80Wy8HJHNoHgpj9BqPtvXRzNqDNjEav5A0TmEkW20sE%3D)

**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.
