clean_body: People can have the best intentions in the world, but if you’re in a group of people and one person starts acting out, things can get out of control VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? | Peter, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on June 28th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. ** Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Peter, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. **. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

subject: Inaugural Happenings!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Today we celebrated the graduation of the inaugural class of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470718?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Inaugural Happenings!**_ Today we celebrated the graduation of the inaugural class of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel joined us and delivered the keynote to our graduates. This inaugural class has really set a high bar for what the series can become. We created this leadership program as a way to broaden our party, to recruit more leaders, and to build authentic relationships with communities that haven’t always supported Republicans. We couldn’t have been more thrilled with how this first cohort went and I’m grateful to the entire class for investing their time and talents to get this series started right. Many thanks to Chairwoman McDaniel, Governor Holcomb, and Senator Todd Young for helping us honor the graduates today.

This week we also announced another inaugural event, this one the official inauguration celebration of the Holcomb-Crouch team! As many of you remember, we postponed the traditional celebratory events that lead up to the swearing in of the governor and lt. governor. Country music legends Big & Rich will kick off our celebrations with a concert on August 19 and we will also host a Boots and Black Tie Gala on Saturday, August 21. This celebration isn’t just to honor Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch, we’re doing this as a way to celebrate the shared victories of the entire team that made this historic reelection possible. Sponsorship and ticket information is below.
Thanks,

Kyle

**_Photo:_**_ Chairman Hupfer celebrating the graduation of the inaugural Indiana Diversity Leadership Class._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_A Week of Celebrations_**
**Governor Holcomb** attended the 25th Anniversary Celebration of Victory Field on Monday. While there, he had the opportunity to throw the first pitch - leading off the celebrations for the night!

**Governor Holcomb** attended the graduation of the inaugural class of our Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series where he was joined by RNC National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Senator Todd Young. We are extremely proud of this first class and cannot wait to see how they will impact the lives of Hoosiers across the state.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb celebrating the 25th anniversary of Victory Field. Gov. Holcomb delivering remarks at the graduation ceremony of the inaugural class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series._
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4c53488d02&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Pelosi Blocks Rep. Jim Banks**_ In a purely partisan political move, Nancy Pelosi has banned Representative Jim Banks from serving on the January 6 Committee. See his quote about being banned here: _**"As a member of Congress and an Afghanistan veteran I’m disappointed in this unprecedented move by Speaker Pelosi. She knows Jim Jordan and I will fight for our country and for the truth. This proves again this is entirely a political stunt, not a true effort to follow the facts." -Rep. Jim Banks**_
Watch his press conference here: [https://twitter.com/RepJimBanks/status/1417919729830928385](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c163b732f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Lugar Series Applications**_ Applications for the 32nd Class of the Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series are now available! The Lugar Series is a political leadership development program dedicated to increasing the number of Republican women in local, state and federal elective and appointive office. The application period opened on June 1 and closes on August 1, 2021. Information about the application can be found at [lugarseries.com/apply/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b1b1a12f3&e=1acd9bb3d6) or by contacting [lugarseries@gmail.com](mailto:lugarseries@gmail.com).
---
|
---
| _**Holcomb-Crouch Inauguration Announcement**_
You are invited to join us for our Holcomb-Crouch inaugural events! RSVP at [www.imagineindiana.org](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2937697775&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Welcome Young Republican National Federation Delegates!**_ We’re excited to welcome the Young Republican National Federation delegates to Indianapolis this week for their annual convention! We want to give a special shout out to Jeff Cummins and the entire team at the Indiana Federation of Young Republicans for their tireless efforts to bring this conference to Indiana. Our entire state continues to benefit from the involvement of the Federation of Young Republicans and we couldn’t be happier to showcase the Hoosier State to all the national delegates joining us these next few days. Welcome Young Republican National Federation Delegates!
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[July 30](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a9b7db0892&e=1acd9bb3d6): 30th Annual Newton County GOP Golf Open
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=961468c01d&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d4a961e84b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Parke County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2baa86e0e7&e=1acd9bb3d6): Dekalb County Lincoln Day Dinner
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[meets with the creators of NotableMeasures](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=304fe77dee&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch**[attends the Indiana Association of Chiefs of Police Conference ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3073a3709&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell** [is looking to hire an Executive Director to oversee Education Scholarship Account Program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4fb80620bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[announces refundable tax credits for Hoosiers](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=27d7d98c39&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[meets with the Angola Area Chamber of Commerce](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fa9982e896&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita** [announces settlement for Hoosier opioid relief](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a65276988f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[helps reform the organ donation system ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c84bd3ac81&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[seeks to make community colleges more accessible ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d2ed20ecba&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski**[shows support for the people of Cuba](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5c1ed5a939&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[responds to Speaker Pelosi blocking his appointment to the January 6th committee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8edd97552c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [responds to the protests in Cuba ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=984f81957a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [supports our 2nd Amendment rights](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f33aa2ac80&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence** [meets with Superior Industrial Solutions in Connersville](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=71b748f464&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[criticizes Biden's influence on inflation](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ab13db138&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[tours IBC Advanced Alloys' new expansion](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=84368e4754&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Michael Whatley
subject: It’s up to you and me, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party ([nc
body:
We have to Save America.

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I _really_ need your help. Right now in Congress, the Democrats are hatching an elaborate plot to undermine our constitution and rig our elections. They’re trying to end Voter ID, legalize ballot harvesting, and stuff Democrat campaigns full of taxpayer money. You’ve probably heard about this scheme already on the news: they call it “H.R. 1,” but I call it the “**The Corrupt Politicians Act** ” (because that’s the only people it helps). **[I’m working hard to organize Grassroots Republicans and stop this radical, socialist takeover of our elections -- but I need your help. clean_body: We have to Save America. | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I really need your help. Right now in Congress, the Democrats are hatching an elaborate plot to undermine our constitution and rig our elections. They’re trying to end Voter ID, legalize ballot harvesting, and stuff Democrat campaigns full of taxpayer money. You’ve probably heard about this scheme already on the news: they call it “H.R. 1,” but I call it the “The Corrupt Politicians Act ” (because that’s the only people it helps). | | | | | | Listen, Peter: Democrats are unified in their determination to pass this bill and undermine our elections. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Chief James Craig
subject: on Tucker Carlson Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r) | |
---
Peter,

This week, Tucker Carlson let the world know what the #1 governor's race in America is: Michigan.

In fact, that's why he invited me on his show.

We talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and I couldn't be more touched by what Tucker had to say about my time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020:

_" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." _

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn._**

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**That 's why I opened an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan.**

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.
[**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)

Chief James Craig
Former Detroit Police Chief

_P.S. I 'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-167009](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000609:616OTZlNP:m:1:3253819041:65EB297D2EFF93B70BB101B7698E8ABC:r)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Cox Calls Out California GOP Endorsement Trickery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
The insiders are changing the rules in the middle of the election to try and rig the endorsement for their preferred candidate, Kevin Faulconer. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/john-cox-newsom-fiddles-while-california-burns-political-4955350?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0a2222c336&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | | | July 23, 2021

---
|
---
Friends,I am writing to inform you that I will not be pursuing an endorsement from the insiders at the California Republican Party. As you know, the insiders are changing the rules in the middle of the election to try and rig the endorsement for their preferred candidate, Kevin Faulconer.Sadly, this makes the insiders at the CAGOP no better than the Democratic insiders and career politicians who are running our state into the ground. Worse, the Republican insiders’ political schemes ultimately could prevent the recall of Gavin Newsom.Changing the rules at this point in the game is a slap in the face to the grassroots activists who made this recall happen. It wasn’t the California Republican Party insiders who gathered the signatures, who knocked on the doors. It was the grassroots. Today, I stand with them and not the political insiders.I am rejecting the insiders’ backdoor deal because I don’t want them to dampen the enthusiasm of the grassroots and drive down turnout. I want the activists and independents and all those who believe California must be saved to know that there is someone fighting for them. There’s someone who can’t be bought and who won’t owe anything to insiders at a political party.Republicans are rightly frustrated and angry at the insiders telling them what to do. So am I.This situation is made worse because the Republican insiders are now hypocritically doing exactly what they criticized Gavin Newsom and his allies of doing. The Democrats changed the rules of the recall in the middle of the recall. It was called out by the CAGOP as “trickery” and a “political scheme.”I want this recall to succeed. It’s unlikely given his lackluster campaign, but if Kevin Faulconer were to ever emerge as a threat to Gavin Newsom, Faulconer’s handling as San Diego Mayor of a project known as Ash Street provides a treasure chest of fodder for unlimited Newsom campaign ads.The taxpayers of San Diego still have the privilege of paying $500,000 a month for a building they will never be able to use or inhabit in any way. Just recently, we’ve learned a close political donor and a top “volunteer” Faulconer advisor both secretly made millions on the deal. At best, Faulconer looks corrupt; at worst, he appears criminal. Gavin Newsom knows this and is already starting to talk about it.This state is broken because for too long, it has been run by the insiders and the career politicians. Here’s where they’ve gotten us: the biggest homelessness problem in the country, wildfires that are out of control, the highest taxes in the country, families, and businesses fleeing the state for the first time ever, record gasoline prices, children who haven’t seen the inside of a classroom for over a year. Heck, even Mickey Mouse is packing his bags and moving to Florida.I would reject any endorsement that came from a corrupt, back door deal with insiders.Let me tell you why. This state needs to be fixed. It needs big, beastly change. It needs change that the insiders would never go for. When I get sworn in as Governor, I will take an oath to the Constitution of the United States and the Constitution of California.I will owe nothing to the insiders. Donors won’t control me. Corporations won’t own me.We will slash taxes, fix homelessness, reopen our economy, and run a government that is for the benefit of the people and not the insiders.I will owe everything to the grassroots voters of California. And that’s the way it should be.
|
---
Sincerely,John Cox
|
---
| | | **ABOUT** John Cox is a political outsider who’ll shake up Sacramento and cut taxes. California is spiraling downward as it’s been failed by career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, and not those of the average Californian. John’s an outsider, who doesn’t owe the establishment anything. He understands what it’s like to scratch and claw to survive and succeed.

For more information please visit, [**johncox.com**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ba26773a7c&e=b8a6795190)**** and follow @BeastJohnCox on social media.
---

Peter, with the news of the desperate Republican recall of Governor Newsom it’s never been more clear: _**California is at risk of going red.**_

**IF** Republicans succeed in their recall and replace Gavin Newsom with a MAGA Republican, _we’ll be at a HUGE RISK going into the midterms._

**IF** Republicans carry that momentum forward, _every single California Democrat will be vulnerable._

| The Olympics should represent a time all Americans can join together and be proud of our country on the world stage. Unfortunately, we’ve seen anti-American sentiments from some of the athletes that have been chosen to represent us. With the Olympics starting this weekend, it’s clear that some athletes may take it upon themselves to put self over country. **I know that most Americans, if given the opportunity, would proudly stand for our flag and everything it represents.** Do you believe our Olympians should stand proudly and respect our flag?
---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: The left is trying to rewrite America's history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
American children deserve to know the TRUTH about their country, and that is what I am fighting for. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7a2b3f41468b49958b679d50ecadf9f7&_e=3YaG88wbwg3cds0On7b7qBVI_6WNitacezaLTJoYeTCDy7Y8r0OZgHeIJ2VO6zF5-rV0KUP_x8u3FS3UPDB_lOmN7TpaE1qmU6YchgMOrmq4nMdLevyocqXnI29DJPJlOJRYbmED7h4xnuhfGDCw1ycmqb3vIIyMcgS9J8b0UmSbYEhOYjMEokOh9ChYDutjmi7VNY6-RSFdTdZDE_EP3LXh0Y83C47Z0cDPNXLg0igNC-evV77Tm50HLa-V-QrRQDIoNJYo149Yv3MioNQR9S_ILxnWJPtX8galQxP0zqdOalAgMdYCkem1H1oBXOFatg7ahWOMFhi0K1sHXnlaIIzBJBASO5YeJfRX0YES5MN0o3S2-1EFFGE5z1QviZZVkqRywN0j0YFgbHj_KzP2nQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
The left is trying to rewrite our history.

They push the **LIE** that our nation was founded as a systemically evil nation—**THIS IS WRONG**.

America is a nation of **LIBERATORS** , and we must teach our kids the **TRUTH**.

[**Last night I talked with Tucker Carlson about the need for a patriotic education: WATCH HERE:youtu.be/IPCE4OJrv7U**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=7a2b3f41468b49958b679d50ecadf9f7&_e=3YaG88wbwg3cds0On7b7qBVI_6WNitacezaLTJoYeTCDy7Y8r0OZgHeIJ2VO6zF5-rV0KUP_x8u3FS3UPDB_lOmN7TpaE1qmU6YchgMOrmq4nMdLevyocqXnI29DJPJlOJRYbmED7h4xnuhfGDCw1ycmqb3vIIyMcgS9J8b0UmSbYEhOYjMEokOh9ChYDutj1ziESPDarf9AgIXjKsQKQnWObehT71v6iAIkt7TprE5CmuwBlpJ9FKOzWcaro9LT6n05fdcSDcoz2z7lqxyEFPIENF3iDEsdOiI_-6OwYMBHE2B_b_-WRgLy3yTX7oSETI49nBLobAgCKkx5x-LJW0seVCXNw9MDUA1gKC7Nz-I0f9ktJ93Qv2Fgy2lkXa_Qclkt4lxxv_jXIi4OjA6dtQ%3D%3D)** **

I am introducing legislation that would **fight back against the left’s war on truth** by requiring every school district that receives federal funding to teach our kids about America’s fundamental, foundational documents including the Constitution and the Bill of Rights

**These basic understandings about the foundation of our nation should not be controversial!**

Unfortunately, the left will fight this tooth and nail — they are deathly afraid of students knowing the **TRUTH** about America’s founding.

I am introducing legislation that would fight back against the left’s war on truth by requiring every school district that receives federal funding to teach our kids about America’s fundamental, foundational documents including the Constitution and the Bill of Rights These basic understandings about the foundation of our nation should not be controversial! Unfortunately, the left will fight this tooth and nail — they are deathly afraid of students knowing the TRUTH about America’s founding. Their goal is to distract and deceive. The left slanders America’s founding legacy in the hopes that the outrage they planted will grow, all to keep Democrats in power. I won’t stand for it! American children deserve to know the TRUTH about their country, and that is what I am fighting for. In Liberty, Josh | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Texas Dems to be apprehended, Biden fumbles at CNN town hall
body:
don't miss this clip of Biden at the town hall. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4c0c5cf62417/texas-dems-to-be-apprehended-biden-fumbles-at-cnn-town-hall?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Governor Abbott says Democrats from Texas House will be apprehended when they return...
This ongoing stunt by the Democrats from Texas is just that, a stunt. They’re wasting tax-payer dollars, spreading COVID and refusing to do their jobs and vote on legislation. Governor Greg Abbott of Texas joined us last night on _Spicer & Co_ to discuss the Texas Dems that left the state to prevent a vote on voting protection legislation. He told us that in accordance with the Texas constitution, the members will be apprehended when they return. Watch the full segment below—
| [Tune in tonight at 6p](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6f6706245b&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## President Joe Biden during CNN’s town hall last night...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6c781fc6ea&e=f6564bbe3b)
But [you won’t see that clip ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6cb7189edc&e=f6564bbe3b)on the mainstream media today.
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Hunter Biden expected to meet with potential art buyers before anonymous sales](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0dc3b66bfa&e=f6564bbe3b) — in CBS NewsNothing to see here...
|
---
[Kamala Harris says she's speaking with GOP senators about voting rights legislation](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a5e9c55b27&e=f6564bbe3b) — in CBS NewsCBS needs to clarify this headline, it says VP Harris is speaking w Republican senators (plural) about voting rights. The story goes on to say, “Harris' office later clarified that the two had discussed infrastructure, not voting rights.”
|
---
| | | |
---
## Watch _Spicer & Co_ FREE on app and YouTube...
Reminder that you do not need cable to watch Spicer & Co each night at 6p. You can watch it live and for free on YouTube below or download the Newsmax app.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=bcc6f3a043&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
This week [Senate Democrats proposed requiring women to register for military draft](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3ca32bc3d5&e=f6564bbe3b), so I want to know what you think:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f5a70574d1&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4186029a8b&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
A great read for introspection from a great author, [Matthew Kelly](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dac383dd78&e=f6564bbe3b). Not exactly a light summer read, but worth checking out when you have some time. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ab03257fe8&e=f6564bbe3b)

body:
President Biden and his Democrats are counting on your support to guarantee historic voting rights with your support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

But Republicans are just WAITING to strike it down, so we need 935 Democrats to step up and help us pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

PLEASE: Answer President Biden’s call and rush in $3 right now to save the John Lewis Voting Rights Act » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_cardenas_q32021_df-vra]

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_cardenas_q32021_df-vra]

President Biden, Tony Cárdenas, and scores of other Democrats are standing behind the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.

They KNOW the best way to honor John Lewis’s legacy and protect our democracy is passing this amazing piece of legislation.

But here’s the thing: Republicans will do everything to derail this bill and rewrite the election laws of critical states for their favor.

All of our progress -- our very democracy, Peter! -- is on the line. We need 935 Democrats to respond with the urgency this moment deserves.

So will you answer Biden’s call, Peter? Chip in $3 to help us save this legislation and protect pro-democracy Democrats » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_cardenas_q32021_df-vra]

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: what being a nurse means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Oakman?=
subject: RELEASE: Indiana Republican Party Celebrates Inaugural Diversity Series Class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
The Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series celebrated the graduation of the inaugural cohort this afternoon. | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/chairman-hupfer-statement-on-2021-indiana-inauguration-470734?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=41aa15002b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Jake Oakman, [joakman@indiana.gop](mailto:joakman@indiana.gop) **Date:** July 23, 2021 **Indiana Republican Party Celebrates Inaugural Diversity Series Class**
_RNC Chairwoman McDaniel, Governor Holcomb honor graduates_
**INDIANAPOLIS **- Over 300 friends and supporters of the Indiana Republican Party celebrated the graduation of the inaugural cohort of the [Indiana Republican Party Diversity Leadership Series](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=23c7f8b5b4&e=1acd9bb3d6) this afternoon. Republican National Committee Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel, Governor Eric Holcomb, and Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer spoke during the luncheon.

“Things like this just don’t happen. This is intentional. This is a partnership of Governor Holcomb, Chairman Hupfer, and everyone in this room. Expanding coalitions and growing our party has been a passion of mine since I became chair of the RNC. Not just to win votes, but to build authentic relationships and share our message with all communities,” said McDaniel.

The class of 15 graduates represents a wide range of backgrounds and communities across Indiana. The class includes members of law enforcement, military veterans, faith leaders, entrepreneurs and leaders from the public, private, and nonprofit sectors. The inaugural graduates are:
* Tiffanie Ditlevson (Hamilton County)
* Vittorio D’Uva (Monroe County)
* Cody Eckert (Putnam County)
* Michael Garza (Adams County)
* James Jackson (Marion County)
* Sean Jointer (Marion County)
* Paul Jones (Marion County)
* Fletcher Kitchell (Marion County)
* B.R. Lane (Lake County)
* James Lewis III (Marion County)
* Emery McClendon (Allen County)
* Derrick Miller (Marion County)
* Willie Miller (Lake County)
* Christopher Mitchem (Marion County)
* Tasha Phelps (Marion County)

Headshots and bios of each class member can be found by [clicking here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4db244ae2e&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Pictures from today’s celebration are available on the [Indiana Republican Party’s Facebook page.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fdbb64e1d5&e=1acd9bb3d6)

“When I first heard of this program, I thought it was an awesome and courageous project. I’m encouraging my friends and colleagues to apply and participate in a future class. While this diversity leadership series is new, let’s make one thing clear: Indiana Republicans empowering minority communities isn’t new,” said Christopher Mitchem, a member of the graduating cohort.

The Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series is a seminar and leadership training program that provides the preparation and resources needed to increase the engagement of minority Republicans leaders in Indiana. The series involves monthly classes that covered topics including civic engagement, campaign management, strategic communications, fundraising, and state government. Several elected officials and political leaders presented to the cohort including Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, and Senator Todd Young.

“We grow opportunity in Indiana. It’s all about addition and the future of our party is in this room. The future of our state is in this room. That future is in sharing our Republican message with communities that haven’t always heard from us and in building authentic relationships,” said Holcomb.

This series is the first of its kind among state Republican parties. The seminar is part of the Indiana Republican Party’s ongoing work to further develop and strengthen authentic relationships with minority communities.

“Our hope is that this is really a beginning. I hope this is the new beginning for this class and for our Indiana Republican Party. We share a message of unity, inclusion, and opportunity.” said Hupfer.

Applications for the next class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series are open and interested applicants can apply by [clicking here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0b42ef1bba&e=1acd9bb3d6) (scroll to bottom of page). The application deadline is November 10, 2021. **-30-**

name: Chief James Craig
subject: I know why Detroit didn’t burn, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r) | |
---
Peter,

Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan...

But not Detroit.

Why?

**I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)

[**WATCH A SPECIAL MESSAGE FROM CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)
See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city.

I was the first in that day, leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

That's the why.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Day 1 donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)

[**BECOME A DAY 1 DONOR TODAY
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58000651:JG6D6ZlON:m:1:3253819041:B73F76F3C4459E2E45CE44AA2DCBC04F:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**

clean_body: | | Peter, Last summer, Portland burned. Seattle, Minneapolis, Atlanta. Even some cities in Michigan... But not Detroit. Why? I'm Chief James Craig, former Detroit Police Chief - and I know why Detroit didn't burn. See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs. I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens. But there's more to the "why?" than that. When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. I was the first in that day, leading from the front. Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. That's the why. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. I don't see much of that out there. | **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Dear ****Derek,**

**Thanks to all who joined the NHGOP in celebrating Augusta Petrone this past Saturday at Labelle Winery. It was a night filled with great wine and fun conversations. Augusta’s kindness and strength have touched so many members of our party, and her efforts to expand Republican leadership in New Hampshire is unparalleled. That being said, it was only right that this week’s Republican of the week is Augusta so don’t forget to check out that section further down below. ****

For those who may have missed it, we were also visited by Senator Tom Cotton and RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks. Over the course of the weekend they attended multiple events across the state, speaking to Granite Staters and encouraging them to take a stand against the radical left’s agenda! From having constructive breakfast conversations in Rockingham, to joining in on shooting machine guns in Hillsborough, they took the time to connect with as many NH residents as possible!

To help support one of our own local Republicans, RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks joined myself and fellow supporters to talk to voters about the upcoming Bedford special election and candidate Linda Camarota by knocking on doors. She is running for State Representative in Hillsborough District 7. It is critical that we ensure this seat as a Republican win, so please join me in supporting Linda in her efforts! Even in the summer heat, voters were happy to converse with us and excited to have a strong republican candidate in the race! Check out her campaign site and ways to get involved **[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Flindacamarota.org%2Flc%2F/1/0100017ad5285347-45319a57-bfdd-4916-b2f5-82766e35cae9-000000/bXGQsEWvWkafUs5EFY0V0o15DA4=228)[**here**](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Flindacamarota.org%2Flc%2F/2/0100017ad5285347-45319a57-bfdd-4916-b2f5-82766e35cae9-000000/wRFItD2h7ee_I5zuKBx-c0vy9X0=228)[](http://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/http:%2F%2Flindacamarota.org%2Flc%2F/3/0100017ad5285347-45319a57-bfdd-4916-b2f5-82766e35cae9-000000/FUNbSCAmLzX-0p0XUELYyQtt6iQ=228)**! ****

If you’ve yet to join us for any of these summer happenings be sure to keep an eye on the NHGOP website! There are ranges of events, guest speakers, and ticket pricing in order to accommodate a variety of tastes.

Finally, I urgently seek for everyone to take a few minutes of their busy schedules to submit letters to the editor pieces to local publicans. We must continue to fight back against the false rhetoric of Democrat activists, and every letter counts! If you have any questions, or would like to request a draft letter, email maya@nhgop.org! **

| **
****Concord, NH – Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after Biden Administration mentions door-to-door campaign targeted at unvaccinated Americans:
**
**_“This type of political strong-arm tactic would not be well received by citizens of the Granite State. Legislators in New Hampshire will continue the fight to protect patients’ privacy and fight against federal overreach. We are well on our way to getting families and businesses back on track. Vaccines are available to those wishing to get vaccinated, and this idea of going door-to-door to private homes is not something we would ever consider or welcome here.”_**

**
****Leader Osborne ****Statement**** on President Biden’s Vaccine Tactics**
___**“The Biden Administration has made it abundantly clear that they are not shy about intruding on Americans' right to medical privacy. The President’s call to begin targeting the doors of unvaccinated individuals is yet another reminder that this administration will trample our liberties if left unchecked. The Republican caucus remains committed to continuing our work to strengthen medical freedom and preserve privacy rights in New Hampshire. Granite Staters exercising their right to refuse a medical treatment should not be subject to an intimidation campaign at their doorstep. When the government tries to intrude on our households, it is up to us to slam the door in their face.”**_**

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

clean_body: Keep up with NHGOP happenings! | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | Weekly Newsletter ** Note from Chairman Stepanek Weekly Governor's Glance **Upcoming Events House Republican Update Senate Republican Update Republican Spotlight Noteworthy News NHGOP Tweets NH Federation of Republican WomenNH Young RepublicansNH Federation of College Republicans | | Dear Derek, Thanks to all who joined the NHGOP in celebrating Augusta Petrone this past Saturday at Labelle Winery. It was a night filled with great wine and fun conversations. Augusta’s kindness and strength have touched so many members of our party, and her efforts to expand Republican leadership in New Hampshire is unparalleled. That being said, it was only right that this week’s Republican of the week is Augusta so don’t forget to check out that section further down below. For those who may have missed it, we were also visited by Senator Tom Cotton and RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks. Over the course of the weekend they attended multiple events across the state, speaking to Granite Staters and encouraging them to take a stand against the radical left’s agenda! From having constructive breakfast conversations in Rockingham, to joining in on shooting machine guns in Hillsborough, they took the time to connect with as many NH residents as possible! To help support one of our own local Republicans, RNC Co-Chair Tommy Hicks joined myself and fellow supporters to talk to voters about the upcoming Bedford special election and candidate Linda Camarota by knocking on doors. She is running for State Representative in Hillsborough District 7. It is critical that we ensure this seat as a Republican win, so please join me in supporting Linda in her efforts! Even in the summer heat, voters were happy to converse with us and excited to have a strong republican candidate in the race! Check out her campaign site and ways to get involved ! If you’ve yet to join us for any of these summer happenings be sure to keep an eye on the NHGOP website! There are ranges of events, guest speakers, and ticket pricing in order to accommodate a variety of tastes. Finally, I urgently seek for everyone to take a few minutes of their busy schedules to submit letters to the editor pieces to local publicans. We must continue to fight back against the false rhetoric of Democrat activists, and every letter counts! If you have any questions, or would like to request a draft letter, email maya@nhgop.org! | Stephan Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | | | | | | | | Weekly Governor's Glance | | | | | "Check out the Summer Stipend Program!" | | | | | | "Follow Governor Chris Sununu on Twitter!" | | Upcoming Events | | | | J uly 28th Hollis Wine & Cheese Scholarship Event | | | "Buy Tickets" | | J uly 29th Greater Wilton BBQ Meet & Greet | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 7th Strafford County Summer Picnic | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 17th Regina Birdsell's Taste of the Towns | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 21st NHFRW Tea & Garden Party SOLD OUT August 21st Belknap County Country Gala Feat Senator Rick Scott | | | "Buy Tickets" | "Buy Tickets" | | August 25th Manchester Republican Tiki Fundraiser | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 28th Young Republicans Annual Pig Roast | | | "Buy Tickets" | | August 27th Nashua Republican Steak out | | | "Buy Tickets" | | | | | | | Concord, NH – Speaker Sherman Packard (R-Londonderry) released the following statement after Biden Administration mentions door-to-door campaign targeted at unvaccinated Americans: “This type of political strong-arm tactic would not be well received by citizens of the Granite State. Legislators in New Hampshire will continue the fight to protect patients’ privacy and fight against federal overreach. We are well on our way to getting families and businesses back on track. Vaccines are available to those wishing to get vaccinated, and this idea of going door-to-door to private homes is not something we would ever consider or welcome here.” Leader Osborne Statement on President Biden’s Vaccine Tactics “The Biden Administration has made it abundantly clear that they are not shy about intruding on Americans' right to medical privacy. The President’s call to begin targeting the doors of unvaccinated individuals is yet another reminder that this administration will trample our liberties if left unchecked. The Republican caucus remains committed to continuing our work to strengthen medical freedom and preserve privacy rights in New Hampshire. Granite Staters exercising their right to refuse a medical treatment should not be subject to an intimidation campaign at their doorstep. When the government tries to intrude on our households, it is up to us to slam the door in their face.” | To view the entire House Calendar for the week, click the link below! | | "Calender Link" | | | Senate Republican Update | | | | Become friends with NH Senate Republicans! Follow their page on ! Check out the following pro-life piece by Sens. Regina Birdsell & Sharon Carson | | | | Republican Spotlight : Augusta Petrone | | | | This week’s Republican of the week is no other than our wonderful Augusta Petrone. Augusta is a long time friend to many within the party here in New Hampshire, and we want to take this opportunity to acknowledge all she’s done to help Republican Granite Staters. It is her strength, commitment, and kindness that is admired by all, and we are so grateful to have her on our team!** | | | Noteworthy News | | | NH Teachers Pay $7M in Dues, Nearly All Goes to High Salaries for Union Execs. — NH Journal (@NewHampJournal) “By a landslide vote, they don’t want racially divisive critical race theory taught to their children or forced on their teachers. Voters agreed with my positive vision of our community and its future.” — NHJournal News (@NewsNHJ) | | | | | | | "NHGOP on Twitter" | | | | | | | | | | | "NH Federation of Republican Women" | | | | | Tickets are ON SALE NOW for Members & Associate Members (June 16 for Non Members) for our Tea & Garden Party hosted by Augusta Petrone and our National Committeewoman Juliana Bergeron on Saturday, August 21, 2021 from 1-3pm in Dublin, NH! This event sold out almost immediately last year. ** Secure your spot now:****** Due to high demand and limited space, we advise purchasing your ticket as soon as possible, both women and men are invited to attend! If you are not a Member but would like to purchase an individual ticket before June 16, you are welcome to join our organization for $35 to receive early access and the discounted rates for this event and upcoming events: This is our major fundraiser of the year and sponsorships are key to our fundraising efforts as we get a head start on our 2022 get-out-the-vote efforts and candidate support. Please consider sponsoring this incredible event and supporting New Hampshire Republican women as we work to empower, connect, support and inspire conservatives across the Granite State!** ****Contactmailto:info@nhfrw.org with inquiries! | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. | | | | "Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Friend,
**We want to set the record straight on who is funding Liberal Lisa Murkowski’s campaign.**
Here are the fact based on Federal Election Commission Report from April to June:
* She has a war chest of $1.1 million
* 24% of her fundraising is from Dark Money Political Action Committees

And recognize any of these donors; Liberal Maine Sen. Angus King’s leadership PAC, Americans for Action on Climate Fund, Vail Resorts Employee Political Action, Environmental Defense Action Fund, Amazon, and Comcast NBC just to name a few...

Conversely here are the facts on our campaign:
* Has raised over $750,000 in under 100 days
* Has raised 400% more than Murkowski from Alaskan Donors
* Has raised 850% more in donations under $200 than Murkowski

And we are endorsed by the Alaska Republican Party and President Trump!
Do you see the difference? Our movement is supported by grassroots supporters like YOU! Not by Liberal Super PACS like Lisa Murkowski.
[_**But to keep up this momentum and DEFEAT Murkowski we need YOU to step up with a donation of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 right now. Your support will go a long way in ensuring we have the resources to send her into retirement once and for all! >>>

clean_body: | | | | It’s not Alaskans or Conservatives Friend, We want to set the record straight on who is funding Liberal Lisa Murkowski’s campaign. Here are the fact based on Federal Election Commission Report from April to June: She has a war chest of $1.1 million 24% of her fundraising is from Dark Money Political Action Committees And recognize any of these donors; Liberal Maine Sen. Angus King’s leadership PAC, Americans for Action on Climate Fund, Vail Resorts Employee Political Action, Environmental Defense Action Fund, Amazon, and Comcast NBC just to name a few... Conversely here are the facts on our campaign: Has raised over $750,000 in under 100 days Has raised 400% more than Murkowski from Alaskan Donors Has raised 850% more in donations under $200 than Murkowski And we are endorsed by the Alaska Republican Party and President Trump! Do you see the difference? Our movement is supported by grassroots supporters like YOU! Not by Liberal Super PACS like Lisa Murkowski. We cannot let the Special Interest Swamp Donors take over Alaska. ** For Alaska, Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

subject: What's Pelosi so afraid of?

body:
Fellow Conservative, As you know, Nancy Pelosi pulled an unprecedented political move. She rejected Congressman Jim Jordan and I from the Jan. 6 Select Committee in a disgusting and blatantly partisan political power play. I served my country in Afghanistan but Nancy Pelosi wants to block me from serving on a committee in Congress. She wants to malign conservatives and push their radical authoritarian agenda. I wanted to ask the tough questions and get the truth out, but Nancy Pelosi just silences anyone who disagrees with her.
As patriots, we have to fight back against her political attacks and her Socialist agenda. subject: Beware Big Tech-Government Censorship 🚫

body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj2SX1jQOeux9lBqAebFUrYZ68AdAbp7ycLpzer4xlWrKkzxpjNaEoB2B3wYhWXcsh3wstoBFavBp35geaeaZ4vWdn15_0luXQZWLx0OsvcO4ZDhWTr1egCb3Hoc0eHyV0J4B1oTCoRItwSp7Y08t3jZSyNglFYrz5P9Y1tt0d121ThWNxRJIMgz0e8QRGqq3bTSnEuG3RXzXODA1MfGZnemYCbpwcHEc210LCeRvzGqTjoWJoVKKRDExdZgi1G5sk3ME9q5y_VBiuQrxs0aaWWo%3D) | |

**Beware Big Tech-Government Censorship 🚫**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj2SX1jQOeux9lBqAebFUrYZ68AdAbp7ycLpzer4xlWrKkzxpjNaEoB2B3wYhWXcshx7tnLMWJ0zlu5sO-SRmRTDgmd5eEO7uc5tvRWo0qsDoSiyHxc4oqpC_-Bxg-GDFcRFmr5wK6FOXBntx8wZs7zDNY3reP7vv5RkyH6sWfcf-cR-HH04Gl3z0P4ce62QxP0hRgfLarPBzmcucX083Csl8_yNcSdkRYBfV4Hv38kvnAjpcITJQ-yL2tlFnUw8gEeWnY-av5Ur2WyboEIERfJo%3D)

It’s bad enough when Big Tech censors conservatives. Now, the federal government is colluding with Facebook to decide what kind of COVID-related information is allowed.

Sound fishy? Keep reading.

Press Secretary Jen Psaki recently [reveal](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj1ub5-ZPIrExjrcbupTkBjkM-i4fVZ_L4pypqnlpsDlKJMDBC8tHzk3vPNBP7klMr-9gEkA_WLQPsbbLDG_F8q8EeHrt7NAEyDnm3OjYSj_EjH0iCk-jkwaTGP2yV0hBl2FEPYoalaReRBhZeNx7IAVhcKLzkxxE2ZzjuWIRdbaW_a7tZShkBmL10kc-Y-gyza9iE7H8bPuNaCdRurmhQdIO98CFL0KD3zppP0ME9f4s50P4dwt1RjETmRIUxpq2on9VHExQjbs3SqkjZpSeZT9ekF-29utM545saIcElH259zjMGn_MPGmq-TrnxgGNmyqtYpzU1XrUxfXzFQ99dbA%3D)[ed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj1ub5-ZPIrExjrcbupTkBjkM-i4fVZ_L4pypqnlpsDlKJMDBC8tHzk3vPNBP7klMr-9gEkA_WLQPsbbLDG_F8q8EeHrt7NAEyDnm3OjYSj_EjH0iCk-jkwaTGP2yV0hBlzncSkvVN0i06VYJubNKxNu89PdMetlwURSl-AejSymZvO_Fde2xaZZ81QR-x3yiKWcmWEmOZHlqK8EeL2_yiHgumT40-TUAPz_pbun3EXeVQyLNLkNrGTbVi2JyNawCOPntEBSSxWYMtbA6WNEge0zJ4XvpHpnct2HXLBFOheqkN8wLXaOaxrWtGTGL-V5mrN6VYlxtm6QIZcJ9mGNTSkA%3D) that the Biden administration is working with Facebook to flag posts they believe spread “misinformation” about COVID-19 and vaccines.

This takes Big Tech censorship to a whole new, dangerous level.

Now, it’s not just private companies that are trying to silence Americans; it’s the actual government. We are wading into deep, unconstitutional waters.

Conservatives have long been the [victims](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj1ub5-ZPIrExjrcbupTkBjlb8aB4eganLBJRQCFf_Z0ctAnLWwDlaDT-hB56rbVdF8ov0co863aMVn-NfGbDbQ00SodkwS8lIS8LeeXu-IZb2_P6pr_30qZ_MtxR1QX05ex9KbB-mGvYuquTgqcsqLmBp_sU_Wn6VCup1Y7s0W5BU7Lb9ooR7eB0bOZQVlnHYha6VSNSCV1IEoJ6HdZ46MxuXUCkbGj4_2PYQctEeD00Pr6FCXHqd-t8ceJsLkzvCTmoaJIG3GuZVjMpfvp69eFMoUAtQclzHBShPhGtgIpaaWUS1_EJr8Xur6TfQseMXOqXTlxQe4SWZVOaERpMgPN5ru0SoUS2-chBgLy0moerlSYt0rRoyup2yrqCd5sNPw%3D%3D) of Big Tech censorship. That’s no surprise. The woke left is determined to stamp out any “unacceptable” views. But the recent government involvement should be a warning to ALL Americans. It starts with government blocking “problematic” information about COVID on Facebook; who knows where it will end?
|

**Honoring Our Heroes 🚴**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj_vz-r9Tp2kpGn0M3FSxblSDjSGSTAMYP9GCCxZgLtBi4XL1MliW_8GsL9-mKkdiauQeB1mqLti-jprwQbXjcyTZxH3HGEIBo1M1dZlKf_0gxIrXdmNjTZQc7YIlM6zCE5K34qMKy9RGiMbcD2jFMBgOwgq_Axn7UezkDcsxq0u009sjV4fQwdDBAI2lRxwn3JIv_NVLNaQwmo1qxjw-dQ1fgBLknRtbuF0DdS0bKC0jJbuMzLtirPpXYFl8sEvdSuSBplHQFZ0U6nXWAMGp5LG8de2SbwwxWm_nxqG-ZN0BTQE8jTX9Cc3bODNUeLDHKvsCnHodJPv2GMWMAieVcNZ1W6r4e9NX-YJ6KQYKtiKa)

The brave men and women of our Knoxville Police Department are taking part in a [350-mile cycling event](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=ad8d9c7dcda546f4b4b17859e05cdc70&_e=Q4CFeDwBzttogDfqfIsxj_vz-r9Tp2kpGn0M3FSxblSDjSGSTAMYP9GCCxZgLtBi4XL1MliW_8GsL9-mKkdiauQeB1mqLti-jprwQbXjcyTZxH3HGEIBo1M1dZlKf_0gxIrXdmNjTZQc7YIlM6zCE5K34qMKy9RGiMbcD2jFMBhhX_PSyB0j-OcGHufLP-A9aXurPiZ5AK6u-llvdaKPHmyeR8wytsQQSdS20Wr7pLdtYQF9laIsExfvowCX-lbCK5lvaozbWkJSaaBYhVS3zCPAaoWQcpqEDkdHCMKlOk52ZouRHSxCr-m-JzCYyDvW_LJri9LQNO3hWQW7P3zDBqxDTHrbvIll38xD4NagvnObrrlU5oeOHxVaBTbEhnrW) to honor fallen officers. This October, thousands of officers from all over the country will participate to help raise money for the families of fallen officers. **“Our motto is we ride for those who died,”** says Knoxville Police Lieutenant Tammy DeBow. _That’s_ a motto I can get behind.
|

Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | ---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, This week, Jane continued to prove that she is the true America First, grassroots candidate in the race for U.S. Senate. Jane became the first candidate for U.S. Senate in Ohio with contributions from all 88 counties in Ohio, surpassed 300,000 voter contacts for the primary, and continued to rack up endorsements from conservative leaders across the state all while crisscrossing the Buckeye state. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Running the Table for President Trump** On Saturday, Jane joined Steve Bannon: War Room Pandemic with guest host Peter Navarro to give an update on her campaign and talk about how she will fight for the America First agenda. “President Trump absolutely crushed it in Ohio...that is the result of hard work and organizing and getting out the right message – and Jane Timken is the person that organized that. She ran the tables!” – Peter Navarro Watch the full interview: [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b155651974dc4ff0babd5bdbff51d9e1&_e=aGZwKTOPpYZ49hCWarUf8dvD38Vo4GnN8x980jegcgbIbWuFphpcfaoUfw3-j3q9fLlzg8syGhGw8UHKtyHtSrYMTL8U6oOBix4izxlhmHrVEjpn7vCYF5rjzkr0WFdvSwz6bOnRGaq1yOIaIgDZseN1ryva7e6K7vo2xP9nMF1pDWG2WqqwUb_WgPu6XQWHO8PD2C8YHLAcovlNF2pJjBWu1Pn8r4tV1bDYC3y0rL6Tsml6iLLULYZjLzD6BaUv6091jTWAbHd8owGn1-guiAXd_hU465m7mpeXrYkEQZMdaxxsst9qxlcoyy-ALRd_u8yOot3uNiBEA6sqf5cwmwUddQLPRJrAgJgF5Gxcskk%3D) **From the Trail** On Tuesday, Jane joined the Western Stark County Republicans for their monthly meeting. A great group of patriots who are proud to be Americans! Later in the week Jane joined the Richland County Young Republicans. It was a great crowd with great questions about our schools, finding good jobs, and continuing the America First agenda. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b155651974dc4ff0babd5bdbff51d9e1&_e=aGZwKTOPpYZ49hCWarUf8bAWdC7-1yiGuOom2AqipVOk3IG8kR13zaAnOJE3z6jbVdId5GUmPJuw9aW0fa0Y4G3lHlDe0WMfxat7beISR0NtiJHoS2XxaBAsz8ztRW-p_A6jK9ZP-0pOyke8M1iDy_MYr5y4oMv0c9KK5tC66gg57grbtZAskKiy0zOBRSCcfdWZwzqYqgWC-wjA0Jo2ZMnyVWY9OiuFtzlI0O38r6tzznlxlqvd2_quZ_clryURcFwYd51JMq_jddksBYB5t_HRe9lZ1ZlyXtJWhy0G5dcTbwnr2TQSZlRKx6of8N1Q) Jane was thrilled to join State Rep. Gail Pavliga on Thursday night to headline a fundraiser for her re-election efforts. **Latest Endorsements** The campaign continued to rack up endorsements from across the state as Ohio conservative leaders coalesce around Jane as the grassroots candidate in this race. "Northeast Ohio is a very special place and deserves to be represented properly in the United States Senate. That is why I'm supporting Jane Timken. She has lived here for years and understands what our citizens need from our elected officials. She has my full endorsement." - **Bryan Blakeman, Columbiana Co. Treasurer-elect** ** ** _Full List of Endorsements:_ Janelle Dixon, Ashtabula County Central Committee Member
Bryan Blakeman, Columbiana County Treasurer-elect
Glenn Mishler, Coshocton City Council
Stephanie Zader, Mansfield City Council
Jim Thomas, Jackson Township Trustee, Stark County **The True Grassroots Candidate in this Race** On Monday, the campaign announced that Jane had received donations from all 88 Ohio counties, becoming the first U.S. Senate candidate in Ohio to do so and highlighting the strong statewide enthusiasm for her campaign. In addition, the campaign was proud to cross the 300,000 voter contact mark this week thanks to our ever-growing network of conservative leaders, grassroots volunteers, and amazing interns. As the campaign continues, the grassroots momentum continues to grow. Jane knows that winning elections takes grit, hard work, and a good pair of door-knocking shoes and that’s exactly what we’re doing in all four corners of Ohio. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=b155651974dc4ff0babd5bdbff51d9e1&_t=E7Rr1rOPyAFF8fvDXm5dh2qrnnPYpROIsWJgZkVtZ1JSLPbiq-fJa2s2dICQkKtEcgZVvgjwTZdX3O5vdT9Sdv8fRJUtBUTj2-EUq88t5Q0V-QuwLsWe0Z1Q7nWx6QHC7OJk7tPgdccKB0kRCR2g_g8cov6GJ5uKZJqULVuT5ko%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b155651974dc4ff0babd5bdbff51d9e1&_e=aGZwKTOPpYZ49hCWarUf8QZVX-aHKwt9Wx0d7eO0AqEWkwTwAwgSkRzV46N2jmotB4IBQteD9oLm0K7UKQDiFPA_5NpnjLlYI-k-a1FtxXoW90lcpiGOdDassBngwvTSD2qRqnV9uBNDPFBgM7NOrm_7Ee_bj-FPktVMJWlUYlePks9kCBllbnsIqhfBofGlg0NWmwAk6LDD_kDYNa2Wa_7m_iAoJ-kQxqZsk4Eryc-ANns3NqGzVRounWc3TOCh3XQOVLu6P6pDzeC5nIp_NyLa7D_kXOArj0NVu10nbZo%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=b155651974dc4ff0babd5bdbff51d9e1&_e=NPi2k4T5aRgaCMnEYOmPO1nL3Bh-8UxbHUoB0JrMhWoJkpHYidRJCaQQM1V_J5REmuXN2dqYwrYqTs_QbGv5AOXOg2238qhkBQ-xSs0gXe4KsvsbanXeui2sijv4V9hJo-E6sp486F0aUZB062PiSkWeGR5KoUtS4Brd-ww3kv_viPzQxvQUoDRFBPn76exciKeWW48kzWZV7gX0mLgQgX1PLh39wM8Mfic21cLd-5s8scYfUybQuEJ5DqknCcGybAR8VslIvYqqufrAgkNUkg%3D%3D)

name: Stefanie Sass
subject: memo
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends—

As we move closer to the end of the month, I wanted to give you a quick update on fundraising.

First, the good news. We launched this campaign in June and had a strong first month of fundraising thanks to grassroots supporters like you. It’s clear we have the momentum.

But friends, I’m worried right now. July is one of the most difficult months to raise money, and we’re on pace to fall short of our monthly goal.

If we can raise just $3,491 before Saturday at midnight, we’ll be in a strong position heading into the last week of July. Can you click here to chip in now and help us get back on track? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Campaigns write about deadlines all the time, so I want you to know why this is so important.

Ron DeSantis continues to raise millions each month from wealthy political donors across the country. Hitting our fundraising benchmarks each month means we can execute our most aggressive plan to defeat DeSantis next year.

Reaching our July goal directly affects what we’re able to accomplish next year. Please click here to donate, help us stay on track, and stop Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-nf-july-eom]

Thanks!
Stefanie Sass
Finance Director

subject: Will you help me support Miller-Meeks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
Someone you NEED to know about.

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=2fe9bba97c6640ff85ce9bc8163ab226&_e=yO_EU0ZcaKYCTbk79Z_WUownTUWqOO7zg0OuzsvcTx-64UdQuMyGg-erXjWy5vXtXMLMmNX3hvwTuOIWDPjGutLFsG4LrvXSgTB7wqh50o14ci6ux6RpRg4X_ATDWEaNm-YzGkAGeV8tCfKiMPEUn_NmB83vNdaf5nDeMCTkF3zcLbyK3mqGe8-BtcF_Kkjd0fzF7DDKMNqTO-5fJPPZUaW8shOGURh4XpynERO0odvt9GSmRVAQqJWYXf092ntqgO3HwF3stwc2OUEUaz47igShUX37QDo66iP5cQfKtUPBT4C3tQxo2VAozH_U-YP-Q3DUfPn0R6wejaW2dXgmPFqdHsAsRI1xUtuVLIrQL9nrfAFt_5nHPx45w0nsPCbgwFTfKxruXqajsxoGA4KADAsXQmmc0WL0jDCfgBfeyrDcW71oa9wfBWNGHZSxIShovKSvcZmq2hA8vM8PKeAOpgYKAZVXw0K11l8TRFR1_mqrQZX853cfxBN9YFtDAh7z7JR6dCXoGr1vc93focpaaw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

**_I wanted to let you know how important Congresswoman Mariannette Miller-Meeks is for our nation._**

In my time serving as President Trump's Secretary of State, I saw firsthand how far the Democrats will go to stop our conservative agenda. We need people in Congress who will fight back against their dirty tricks, and that’s exactly who Mariannette is. **When Nancy Pelosi tried to steal her certified election victory, she fought back and won.** We need more of that fighting spirit from Republicans in Congress, and that’s why I’m proud to support Congresswoman Miller-Meeks for re-election.
| [**STEP UP NOW TO SUPPORT CONSERVATIVES IN CONGRESS!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=2fe9bba97c6640ff85ce9bc8163ab226&_e=yO_EU0ZcaKYCTbk79Z_WUownTUWqOO7zg0OuzsvcTx-64UdQuMyGg-erXjWy5vXtXMLMmNX3hvwTuOIWDPjGutLFsG4LrvXSgTB7wqh50o14ci6ux6RpRg4X_ATDWEaNm-YzGkAGeV8tCfKiMPEUn_NmB83vNdaf5nDeMCTkF3zcLbyK3mqGe8-BtcF_Kkjd0fzF7DDKMNqTO-5fJPPZUaW8shOGURh4XpynERO0odvt9GSmRVAQqJWYXf092ntqgO3HwF3stwc2OUEUaz47igShUX37QDo66iP5cQfKtUPBT4C3tQxo2VAozH_U-YP-UsdWJPtXM-nlJf8cIpZcR4jMv0mEOdmJYnmvJtsNqAKdjKZRnVJqO6pIvPvLL-KEHq3OfX1qpRn3ZvzxrECnPD5q5NN1TgTHa0P1ikWfSSY1-uXCzqq3w3QHq4f1sGbFdn63HIg-JyT8Dnf-XSQc_jhxI3UjH7sc4MqXqjB36aBnKAIMmBZAELPc2ivmKjx3mittBDaoO3bGz3O3MxPaag%3D%3D)
---

Congresswoman Miller-Meeks has worked **tirelessly** to support the people of Iowa and this nation. She is a hardworking and honest candidate who is more than equipped to do great things for Iowa and the nation.

[**Will you join me in supporting Mariannette Miller-Meeks for Congress? body:
|
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=34ffe7bfa94845fea99455114d42136f&_e=J29pU_NyqNgNPIBVjDAfvnPRE3yhdUqZDQduhfHK2DqHOJ-WP6aV95_Nw17K-F5MbCBjIWItdtIeAxIM37PtbhhWjpk6Cav8U2hacCedJwgSVdNJ_xR1QLdVDUhcedARrDxx6wOaAmkeqBRCT-BleKG8S0AjZ5ZnaTgNf9tVidMR8HZZ3zqv5aHVvOZRSxDBQA5SYmMZnkVLHmTRXXrEiGHgQ91GZUreIIp3t4qSPi_SgfAzwAjj8GkgW-kxnw-W542pfQMXqTtu9mj0zt_G-IfTmbbrZoaX3X0EwDazwNXJDDU248JcvphNeSmJLeTcKZkBgfhbBVgq2Dw_oV857FUCKdfnhmZwbC1-_81j8-ExwTNbfx40_mYbQgAYYvPhcr2qvp_ip2cQyap27AywJT1OJxar_GO6L_NF1cw1-FZs0ZgtyQGeOXvrKyboyieZoeuEacexy4PzAxS8I42SOpqXl0zhmWgyAYlO2Iw1rvpkspBUbBnF9gvkQjhpC1GlC683Jm-nLMMdgqPYHhezyQ%3D%3D)
---

People often say to me, "Bet you're glad to be out of that pressure cooker and back in private life." My honest answer is: "Actually, no, I'd still like to be Secretary of State." Representing America in a position first held by Thomas Jefferson was an incredible privilege. If the aim is to spend every day defending and advancing the interests of the United States, then that's the job you want.

Even though I'm no longer Secretary of State, **I 've kept up the fight through my new organization: CAVPAC.** We are focused on championing our core American values and working every single day to elect more principled conservatives who will push back against the "woke" liberals and their socialist agenda.

_There are people in our country intent on tearing America down every single day._ They are trying to convince people that America is an evil and racist country. They talk about defunding the police and opening up our borders to anyone and everyone. They are pushing to teach un-American Critical Race Theory in our schools while their economic policies are causing prices to skyrocket for hardworking families. This is what we are up against.
**[DON'T LET WOKE SOCIALISTS GET YOU DOWN](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=34ffe7bfa94845fea99455114d42136f&_e=J29pU_NyqNgNPIBVjDAfvnPRE3yhdUqZDQduhfHK2DqHOJ-WP6aV95_Nw17K-F5MbCBjIWItdtIeAxIM37PtbhhWjpk6Cav8U2hacCedJwgSVdNJ_xR1QLdVDUhcedARrDxx6wOaAmkeqBRCT-BleKG8S0AjZ5ZnaTgNf9tVidMR8HZZ3zqv5aHVvOZRSxDBQA5SYmMZnkVLHmTRXXrEiGHgQ91GZUreIIp3t4qSPi_SgfAzwAjj8GkgW-kxnw-W542pfQMXqTtu9mj0zt_G-IfTmbbrZoaX3X0EwDazwNXJDDU248JcvphNeSmJLeTccxQ-u3AIvcOBnhJmJDnyEsd9pnYalng43RtvcNFhb2TuZS1mUpXQ4zFD-y3zht5IZoBxAqtTBI6ceugC98TzuDVxrlMn3kwSHtML9Te2vylRT5YYzGqoIdX9AkbB6a4lmZZMwUVaafqjfW2osALarV3hQx3OT5zX-xqNHmAiIoTgNXDuyqltLO8UxTJoSJ8ai8nogcEEjpeT0Pu5OtARfg%3D%3D "DON’T LET WOKE SOCIALISTS GET YOU DOWN")**
_**That 's why I'm recruiting a Conservative Cavalry of true American patriots to help us fight back against the radical Left, and I hope I can count on you to join us.**_
After graduating from West Point, I served as a cavalry officer in the U.S. Army, leading troops patrolling the Iron Curtain. The cavalry rides to the sound of the guns and fights fearlessly to defend those things that matter most.

That's why we need a Conservative Cavalry right now to push back on the radical Left. **We are sounding the alarm and riding first into the battle for the future of our country.** We are focused on lifting to victory candidates who stand up to the radical Left's agenda.
**[DONATE $100 TO JOIN THE CAVALRY

DONATE $75 TO JOIN THE CAVALRY

DONATE $50 TO JOIN THE CAVALRY

DONATE $25 TO JOIN THE CAVALRY](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=34ffe7bfa94845fea99455114d42136f&_e=J29pU_NyqNgNPIBVjDAfvnPRE3yhdUqZDQduhfHK2DqHOJ-WP6aV95_Nw17K-F5MbCBjIWItdtIeAxIM37PtbhhWjpk6Cav8U2hacCedJwgSVdNJ_xR1QLdVDUhcedARrDxx6wOaAmkeqBRCT-BleKG8S0AjZ5ZnaTgNf9tVidMR8HZZ3zqv5aHVvOZRSxDBQA5SYmMZnkVLHmTRXXrEiGHgQ91GZUreIIp3t4qSPi_SgfAzwAjj8GkgW-kxnw-W542pfQMXqTtu9mj0zt_G-IfTmbbrZoaX3X0EwDazwNXJDDU248JcvphNeSmJLeTcWx4XEmCrr5GR9yc4QczdogF5IbUaKJSieOSS9enclDfxNZxrbDVmKJ_P3Lb0PZc5sogFLuTqZpPCXf8szly23hDoRg_c4Pb8xtlKVGTr0P8yBKw82omRcMa4yEll6sKu7hZT-lD8waqHEURgYkUedz44G0Ze9AbTA1B-uS0oR0LSP5Qc7m42Q80LgpFL1wQhIJ7t6kfoLrzX2pZD61ANng%3D%3D "DONATE $100 TO JOIN THE CAVALRYDONATE $75 TO JOIN THE CAVALRYDONATE $50 TO JOIN THE CAVALRYDONATE $25 TO JOIN THE CAVALRY")**
America must lead with strength, not weakness. The Democrats' mission has been clear: cancel conservatives, cancel freedom and cancel America. It's up to each and every one of us to preserve the greatness of America.
